27531.title: Private Precaution and Public Restrictions: What Drives Social Distancing and Industry Foot Traffic in the COVID-19 Era?
27531.zh_title: 私人预防与公共限制：COVID-19时代什么驱动了社交距离和行业客流量？
27531.authors: Christopher J. Cronin, William N. Evans
27531.abstract: We examine the role of state and local policies to encourage social distancing, including stay at home orders, public school closures, and restrictions on restaurants, entertainment, and large social gatherings. Outcomes come from cell phone records and include foot traffic in six industries (essential and nonessential retail, entertainment, hotel, restaurant, and business services) plus the fraction of cell phones that are home all day. Structural break models show mobility series at the national and state levels start to change dramatically in a short window from March 8-14, well before state or local restrictions of note are in place. In difference-in-difference models, declarations of state of emergency reduce foot traffic and increase social distancing. Stay at home restrictions explain a modest fraction of the change in behavior across outcomes. Industry-specific restrictions have large impacts. For example, restrictions on dining in restaurants reduce traffic in restaurants, hotels, and nonessential retail. Private, self-regulating behavior explains more than three-quarters of the decline in foot traffic in most industries. Restrictive regulation explains half the decline in foot traffic in essential retail and 75 percent of the increase in the fraction home all day. In this latter result, public school closings have a substantial effect.
27531.zh_abstract: 我们考察了州和地方鼓励社交距离的政策作用，包括居家令、公立学校关闭以及对餐馆、娱乐和大型社交聚会的限制。结果来自手机记录，包括六个行业（必需品和非必需品零售、娱乐、酒店、餐饮和商业服务）的客流量，以及全天在家手机的比例。结构断点模型显示，国家和州层面的流动性序列在3月8日至14日的短窗口内开始发生显著变化，远在重要的州或地方限制实施之前。在双重差分模型中，宣布紧急状态减少了客流量并增加了社交距离。居家限制解释了行为变化中适度的一部分。行业特定限制有较大影响。例如，限制在餐馆就餐减少了餐馆、酒店和非必需品零售的客流量。私人自我调节行为解释了大多数行业客流量下降的四分之三以上。限制性法规解释了必需品零售客流量下降的一半，以及全天在家比例增加的75%。在后一个结果中，公立学校关闭有显著影响。

27530.title: The Impact of the WWI Agricultural Boom and Bust on Female Opportunity Cost and Fertility
27530.zh_title: 一战农业繁荣与萧条对女性机会成本和生育率的影响
27530.authors: Carl T. Kitchens, Luke P. Rodgers
27530.abstract: Using variation in crop prices induced by large swings in demand surrounding World War I, we examine the fertility response to crop revenue increases from 1910 to 1930. Our estimates from samples utilizing complete count decennial census microdata and newly collected county-level data from state health reports indicate that agricultural price increases reduced fertility, explaining about 9 percent of the overall decline in fertility over the period. The effect persists years after the collapse of the war boom. Importantly, we show that fertility declines were concentrated in women living on the farm and that fertility declined along both the intensive and extensive margins. Combined, the pattern of estimates is consistent with agricultural women experiencing an increase in the opportunity cost of their time.
27530.zh_abstract: 利用第一次世界大战前后需求大幅波动引起的作物价格变化，我们考察了1910年至1930年间作物收入增加对生育率的反应。我们的估计基于使用完整计数十年一次人口普查微观数据和新收集的县级卫生报告数据，表明农产品价格上涨降低了生育率，解释了该时期生育率总体下降的约9%。这种影响在战争繁荣崩溃后持续多年。重要的是，我们表明生育率下降集中在生活在农场的女性中，并且生育率在集约边际和广延边际上均有所下降。综合来看，估计模式与农业女性时间机会成本增加的解释一致。
27530.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS；JEL：J12, J13, N12, N5

27529.title: The Real Effects of Modern Information Technologies: Evidence from the EDGAR Implementation
27529.zh_title: 现代信息技术的真实效应：来自EDGAR实施的证据
27529.authors: Itay Goldstein, Shijie Yang, Luo Zuo
27529.abstract: Using the implementation of the Electronic Data Gathering, Analysis, and Retrieval (EDGAR) system from 1993 to 1996 as a shock to information dissemination technologies, we examine how a significant reduction in disclosure processing costs affects the real economy. We find that the EDGAR implementation leads to an increase in corporate investment and that this effect is concentrated in value firms. We provide evidence that improved equity financing and enhanced managerial incentives are likely the underlying mechanisms. Specifically, the EDGAR implementation leads to an increase in a firm’s stock liquidity, a decrease in the cost of equity capital, and an increase in the level of equity financing. Consistent with the monitoring effect of broad information dissemination, the EDGAR implementation leads to an increase in a firm’s operating performance. Our findings suggest that it is important to consider information dissemination beyond information production when examining the real effects of corporate disclosures.
27529.zh_abstract: 利用1993年至1996年电子数据收集、分析和检索系统的实施作为信息传播技术的冲击，我们考察了披露处理成本显著降低如何影响实体经济。我们发现EDGAR实施导致企业投资增加，且这种效应集中在价值型公司。我们提供证据表明，改善股权融资和增强管理层激励可能是潜在机制。具体来说，EDGAR实施导致公司股票流动性增加、股权资本成本降低以及股权融资水平提高。与广泛信息传播的监督效应一致，EDGAR实施导致公司经营业绩提升。我们的发现表明，在考察公司披露的真实效应时，除了信息生产外，考虑信息传播也很重要。

27528.title: Identification and Estimation of Undetected COVID-19 Cases Using Testing Data from Iceland
27528.zh_title: 利用冰岛检测数据识别和估计未检测到的COVID-19病例
27528.authors: Karl M. Aspelund, Michael C. Droste, James H. Stock, Christopher D. Walker
27528.abstract: In the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic, international testing efforts tended to target individuals whose symptoms and/or jobs placed them at a high presumed risk of infection. Testing regimes of this sort potentially result in a high proportion of cases going undetected. Quantifying this parameter, which we refer to as the undetected rate, is an important contribution to the analysis of the early spread of the SARS-CoV-2 virus. We show that partial identification techniques can credibly deal with the data problems that common COVID-19 testing programs induce (i.e. excluding quarantined individuals from testing and low participation in random screening programs). We use public data from two Icelandic testing regimes during the first month of the outbreak and estimate an identified interval for the undetected rate. Our main approach estimates that the undetected rate was between 89% and 93% before the medical system broadened its eligibility criteria and between 80% and 90% after.
27528.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行早期阶段，国际检测工作往往针对症状和/或工作使其处于高假定感染风险的个体。这种检测制度可能导致大量病例未被检测到。量化这一参数（我们称之为未检测率）是对SARS-CoV-2病毒早期传播分析的重要贡献。我们表明，部分识别技术可以可信地处理常见COVID-19检测项目引起的数据问题（即排除隔离个体进行检测以及随机筛查项目参与率低）。我们使用冰岛两种检测制度在疫情爆发第一个月的公开数据，估计了未检测率的识别区间。我们的主要方法估计，在医疗系统扩大其资格标准之前，未检测率在89%至93%之间，之后在80%至90%之间。

27527.title: A Theory of Social Impact Bonds
27527.authors: Daniel L. Tortorice, David E. Bloom, Paige Kirby, John Regan
27527.abstract: Social impact bonds (SIBs) are an innovative financing mechanism for public goods. In a SIB, an investor provides capital to a service provider for a social intervention. The investor receives a return based on the outcome of the intervention relative to a predetermined benchmark. We describe the basic structure of a SIB and provide some descriptive statistics for these financial instruments. We then consider a formal model of SIBs and examine their ability to finance positive net present value projects that traditional debt finance cannot. We find that SIBs expand the set of implementable projects if governments are pessimistic (relative to the private sector) about the probability an intervention would succeed or if the government is particularly averse to paying costs associated with a project that does not generate offsetting benefits. As both these features are present in various public programs, we conclude that SIBs are a real innovation in public finance and should be considered for projects when traditional debt finance has been rejected.
27527.zh_abstract: 社会影响债券（SIBs）是一种用于公共产品的创新融资机制。在SIB中，投资者为社会干预项目向服务提供者提供资本。投资者根据干预结果相对于预定基准的表现获得回报。我们描述了SIB的基本结构，并提供了这些金融工具的一些描述性统计。然后，我们考虑了一个SIB的形式化模型，并检验了它们为传统债务融资无法实现的正净现值项目提供资金的能力。我们发现，如果政府（相对于私营部门）对干预成功的概率持悲观态度，或者政府特别厌恶为那些无法产生抵消收益的项目支付成本，那么SIB会扩大可实施项目的范围。由于这两个特征在各种公共项目中都存在，我们得出结论，SIB是公共财政领域的一项真正创新，在传统债务融资被拒绝的项目中应考虑使用SIB。

27526.title: Why Does Globalization Fuel Populism? Economics, Culture, and the Rise of Right-wing Populism
27526.zh_title: 全球化为何助长民粹主义？经济学、文化与右翼民粹主义的兴起
27526.abstract: There is compelling evidence that globalization shocks, often working through culture and identity, have played an important role in driving up support for populist movements, particularly of the right-wing kind. I start with an empirical analysis of the 2016 presidential election in the U.S. to show globalization-related attitudinal variables were important correlates of the switch to Trump. I then provide a conceptual framework that identifies four distinct channels through which globalization can stimulate populism, two each on the demand and supply sides of politics, respectively. I evaluate the empirical literature with the help of this framework, discussing trade, financial globalization, and immigration separately. I conclude the paper by discussing some apparently anomalous cases where populists have been against, rather than in favor of trade protection.
27526.zh_abstract: 有令人信服的证据表明，全球化冲击——通常通过文化和身份认同发挥作用——在推动民粹主义运动（尤其是右翼民粹主义）的支持率上升方面发挥了重要作用。我首先对美国2016年总统选举进行实证分析，以表明与全球化相关的态度变量是转向支持特朗普的重要关联因素。然后，我提供了一个概念框架，识别出全球化刺激民粹主义的四个不同渠道，其中两个分别位于政治的需求侧和供给侧。我借助这一框架评估了实证文献，分别讨论了贸易、金融全球化和移民。最后，我通过讨论一些明显的反常案例来结束本文，在这些案例中，民粹主义者反对而非支持贸易保护。

27525.title: Measuring Employer-to-Employer Reallocation
27525.zh_title: 衡量雇主到雇主的重新配置
27525.authors: Shigeru Fujita, Giuseppe Moscarini, Fabien Postel-Vinay
27525.abstract: We revisit measurement of Employer-to-Employer (EE) transitions, the main engine of labor market competition and employment reallocation, in the monthly Current Population Survey (CPS). We follow Fallick and Fleischman (2004) and exploit a key survey question introduced with the 1994 CPS redesign. We detect a sudden and sharp increase in the incidence of missing answers to this question starting in 2007, when the U.S. Census Bureau introduced a change in survey methodology, the Respondent Identification Policy (RIP). We show evidence of selection into answering the EE question by both observable and unobservable worker characteristics that correlate with EE mobility. We propose a selection model and a procedure to impute missing answers to the key survey question, thus EE transitions, after the introduction of the RIP. Our imputed aggregate EE series restores a close congruence with the business cycle, especially with the onset of the Great Recession, exhibits a much less dramatic drop in 2008-2009 and a full recovery by 2016, and eliminates the spurious appearance of declining EE dynamism in the US labor market after 2000. We also offer the first evidence of the (large and negative) impact of the COVID-19 crisis on EE reallocation.
27525.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了月度当前人口调查（CPS）中雇主到雇主（EE）转换的衡量问题，这是劳动力市场竞争和就业重新配置的主要引擎。我们遵循Fallick和Fleischman（2004）的方法，利用了1994年CPS重新设计时引入的一个关键调查问题。我们检测到，自2007年美国人口普查局引入调查方法变更——受访者身份识别政策（RIP）——以来，该问题缺失答案的发生率突然且急剧增加。我们展示了在回答EE问题时，存在基于与EE流动性相关的可观测和不可观测工人特征的选择性。我们提出了一个选择模型和一个程序，用于在RIP引入后对关键调查问题的缺失答案进行插补，从而估算EE转换。我们插补后的总体EE序列恢复了与商业周期的紧密一致性，尤其是在大衰退开始时，显示出2008-2009年下降幅度小得多，并在2016年完全恢复，消除了2000年后美国劳动力市场EE活力下降的虚假表象。我们还首次提供了COVID-19危机对EE重新配置（巨大且负面）影响的证据。

27524.title: High School Majors, Comparative (Dis)Advantage, and Future Earnings
27524.zh_title: 高中专业、比较（劣势）优势与未来收入
27524.authors: Gordon Dahl, Dan-Olof Rooth, Anders Stenberg
27524.abstract: This paper studies whether specialized academic fields of study in secondary school (i.e., high school majors), which are common in many countries, affect earnings as an adult. Identification is challenging, because it requires not just quasi-random variation into majors, but also an accounting of individuals’ next-best alternatives. Our setting is Sweden, where at the end of ninth grade students rank fields of study and admission to oversubscribed fields is determined based on a student’s GPA. We use a regression discontinuity design which allows for different labor market returns for each combination of preferred versus next-best choice, together with nationwide register data for school cohorts from 1977-1991 linked to their earnings as adults. Our analysis yields several key results. First, Engineering, Natural Science, and Business yield higher earnings relative to most second-best choices, while Social Science and Humanities result in sizable drops, even relative to non-academic vocational programs. The magnitudes are often as large as the return to two years of additional education. Second, the return to completing a major varies substantially as a function of a student’s next-best alternative. Third, the pattern of returns for individuals with different first and second best choices is consistent with comparative advantage for many field choice combinations, while others exhibit comparative disadvantage or random sorting. Fourth, most of the differences in adult earnings can be attributed to differences in occupation, and to a lesser extent, college major. Taken together, these results highlight that the high school majors students choose at age 16, when they have limited information about their skills and the labor market, have sizable effects which persist into adulthood.
27524.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中学阶段的专业化学术领域（即高中专业），这在许多国家很常见，是否会影响成年后的收入。识别具有挑战性，因为它不仅需要专业选择的准随机变化，还需要考虑个人的次优替代方案。我们的研究背景是瑞典，在九年级结束时，学生对学习领域进行排序，对超额申请领域的录取基于学生的平均绩点（GPA）。我们使用断点回归设计，该设计允许每个首选与次优选择组合具有不同的劳动力市场回报，并结合1977-1991年学校队列的全国性登记数据及其成年后的收入。我们的分析得出了几个关键结果。首先，相对于大多数次优选择，工程、自然科学和商业专业能带来更高的收入，而社会科学和人文学科则导致收入大幅下降，甚至相对于非学术性职业项目也是如此。其幅度通常与两年额外教育的回报相当。第二，完成一个专业的回报因学生的次优选择不同而有很大差异。第三，对于具有不同首选和次优选择的个体，其回报模式与许多专业选择组合的比较优势一致，而其他组合则表现出比较劣势或随机排序。第四，成年后收入的大部分差异可归因于职业差异，其次是大学专业差异。综合来看，这些结果突显了学生在16岁时（此时他们对自身技能和劳动力市场信息有限）选择的高中专业，会产生持续到成年的显著影响。
27524.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I26, J24, J31

27523.title: The Incentive Effects of Cash Transfers to the Poor
27523.zh_title: 现金转移对贫困人口的激励效应
27523.authors: Anna Aizer, Shari Eli, Adriana Lleras-Muney
27523.abstract: All redistributive and social insurance programs trade off the potential benefits of transfers with the disincentives these programs generate. We investigate this trade-off using newly collected lifetime data for 16,000 women who applied to the Mothers’ Pension Program, the first cash transfer program in the US. In the short-run cash transfers reduced geographic mobility and delayed marriage of recipients but did not affect who they married or where they moved to. In the long run transfers had no effect on work, marriage or fertility behaviors. They also did not improve the economic conditions of recipients or their longevity.
27523.zh_abstract: 所有再分配和社会保险项目都在转移支付的潜在收益与这些项目产生的负激励之间进行权衡。我们利用新收集的16000名申请美国首个现金转移项目“母亲养老金计划”的女性终生数据来研究这种权衡。在短期内，现金转移减少了受助者的地理流动性并延迟了她们的婚姻，但并未影响她们与谁结婚或迁往何处。从长期来看，转移支付对受助者的工作、婚姻或生育行为没有影响。它们也没有改善受助者的经济状况或延长其寿命。
27523.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I14, I18, I32, I38, J16, N32

27522.title: Risk Aversion, Offsetting Community Effects, and COVID-19: Evidence from an Indoor Political Rally
27522.zh_title: 风险规避、抵消性社区效应与COVID-19：来自室内政治集会的证据
27522.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Andrew I. Friedson, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Drew McNichols, Connor Redpath, Joseph J. Sabia
27522.abstract: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) deems large indoor gatherings without social distancing the “highest risk” activity for COVID-19 contagion. On June 20, 2020, President Donald J. Trump held his first mass campaign rally following the US coronavirus outbreak at the indoor Bank of Oklahoma (BOK) arena. In the weeks following the event, numerous high-profile national news outlets reported that the Trump rally was “more than likely” the cause of a coronavirus surge in Tulsa county based on time series data. This study is the first to rigorously explore the impacts of this event on social distancing and COVID-19 spread. First, using data from SafeGraph Inc, we show that while non-resident visits to census block groups hosting the Trump event grew by approximately 25 percent, there was no decline in net stay-at-home behavior in Tulsa county, reflecting important offsetting behavioral effects. Then, using data on COVID-19 cases and deaths from the CDC and a synthetic control design, we find little evidence that COVID-19 grew more rapidly in Tulsa County, its border counties, or in the state of Oklahoma than each’s estimated counterfactual during the five-week post-treatment period we observe. Difference-in-differences estimates further provide no evidence that COVID-19 rates grew faster in counties that drew relatively larger shares of residents to the event. We conclude that offsetting risk-related behavioral responses to the rally — including voluntary closures of restaurants and bars in downtown Tulsa, increases in stay-at-home behavior, displacement of usual activities of weekend inflows, and smaller-than-expected crowd attendance — may be important mechanisms.
27522.zh_abstract: 美国疾病控制与预防中心（CDC）认为，没有社交距离的大型室内聚集是COVID-19传播的“最高风险”活动。2020年6月20日，唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在美国冠状病毒爆发后，在室内举行的俄克拉荷马银行（BOK）体育馆举行了首次大规模竞选集会。在活动后的几周内，众多知名全国性新闻媒体报道称，根据时间序列数据，特朗普集会“极有可能”是塔尔萨县冠状病毒激增的原因。本研究首次严格探讨了这一事件对社交距离和COVID-19传播的影响。首先，利用SafeGraph Inc的数据，我们表明，虽然前往举办特朗普活动的普查区块组的非居民访问量增长了约25%，但塔尔萨县的净居家行为并未下降，这反映了重要的抵消性行为效应。然后，利用CDC的COVID-19病例和死亡数据以及合成控制设计，我们发现几乎没有证据表明，在我们观察到的治疗后五周内，塔尔萨县、其周边县或俄克拉荷马州的COVID-19增长速度比各自的估计反事实更快。双重差分估计进一步没有提供证据表明，吸引相对较大比例居民参加活动的县的COVID-19发病率增长更快。我们得出结论，对集会的抵消性风险相关行为反应——包括塔尔萨市中心餐馆和酒吧的自愿关闭、居家行为的增加、周末流入人群的日常活动转移以及低于预期的集会出席人数——可能是重要的机制。
27522.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I1

27521.title: Fiscal and Monetary Stabilization Policy at the Zero Lower Bound: Consequences of Limited Foresight
27521.zh_title: 零下限时的财政与货币稳定政策：有限前瞻的后果
27521.abstract: This paper reconsiders the degree to which macroeconomic stabilization is possible when the zero lower bound is a relevant constraint on the effectiveness of conventional monetary policy, under an assumption of bounded rationality. In particular, we reconsider the potential role of countercyclical fiscal transfers as a tool of stabilization policy. Because Ricardian Equivalence no longer holds when planning horizons are finite (even when relatively long), we find that fiscal transfers can be a powerful tool to reduce the contractionary impact of an increased financial wedge during a crisis, and can even make possible complete stabilization of both aggregate output and inflation under certain circumstances, despite the binding lower bound on interest rates. However, the power of such policies depends on the degree of monetary policy accommodation. We also show that a higher level of welfare is generally possible if both monetary and fiscal authorities commit themselves to history-dependent policies in the period after the financial disturbance that causes the lower bound to bind has dissipated. Hence forward guidance continues to play an important role in increasing the effectiveness of stabilization policy.
27521.zh_abstract: 本文在有限理性假设下，重新考虑了当零下限成为常规货币政策有效性的相关约束时，宏观经济稳定可能达到的程度。特别是，我们重新考虑了反周期财政转移作为稳定政策工具的潜在作用。由于当规划期限有限（即使相对较长）时，李嘉图等价不再成立，我们发现财政转移可以成为减少危机期间金融摩擦加剧带来的收缩性影响的有力工具，甚至在某些情况下，尽管利率受到下限约束，仍能实现总产出和通胀的完全稳定。然而，此类政策的效力取决于货币政策的宽松程度。我们还表明，如果货币和财政当局在导致下限约束的金融扰动消退后的时期内，承诺实施依赖于历史的政策，通常可以实现更高的福利水平。因此，前瞻指引在提高稳定政策有效性方面继续发挥着重要作用。

27520.title: Competitive Effects of Federal and State Opioid Restrictions: Evidence from the Controlled Substance Laws
27520.zh_title: 联邦与州阿片类药物限制的竞争效应：来自受控物质法的证据
27520.authors: Sumedha Gupta, Thuy D. Nguyen, Patricia R. Freeman, Kosali I. Simon
27520.abstract: A large concern in U.S. opioid policy is whether supply side controls are effective at reducing the quantity of opioids prescribed, without harmful substitution. An unstudied way that policy targeted a major opioid through the federal Controlled Substance Act (CSA) was the August 2014 scheduling of tramadol products, the second most popular opioid medication at the time. Twelve states implemented the identical policy prior to federal action, providing a unique opportunity to compare effectiveness of the same opioid policy at state versus federal levels. This is important because many recent opioid policy interventions have only taken the form of state actions, while federal policy has largely been advisory. Seven weeks after tramadol's scheduling, the leading opioid form on the market, hydrocodone combination products, was move to the more restricted level II (no refills allowed) from level III in the CSA, allowing us to test a new question in the opioid literature: competitive spillover effects from regulations targeting one drug. Using weekly prescription data spanning 2007-2017, this study finds that tightening prescribing restrictions on one opioid leads to decreases in its use, but also causes some increases in prescriptions of close competitors, leading to no statistically detectable short-run reduction in total opioid prescriptions.
27520.zh_abstract: 美国阿片类药物政策的一个重大关切是，供给侧控制措施能否有效减少处方阿片类药物的数量，同时避免有害的替代。联邦《受控物质法》（CSA）针对一种主要阿片类药物采取的一项未经研究的方式是，2014年8月将曲马多产品（当时第二受欢迎的阿片类药物）列入管制。有12个州在联邦行动之前实施了相同的政策，这提供了一个独特的机会来比较同一阿片类药物政策在州级与联邦层面的有效性。这一点很重要，因为许多最近的阿片类药物政策干预仅采取了州级行动的形式，而联邦政策主要是咨询性的。在曲马多被列入管制七周后，市场上主要的阿片类药物形式——氢可酮复方产品——从CSA的III级被移至更严格的II级（不允许续方），这使我们能够检验阿片类药物文献中的一个新问题：针对一种药物的监管产生的竞争性溢出效应。本研究利用2007-2017年的每周处方数据发现，收紧对一种阿片类药物的处方限制会导致其使用量下降，但也会导致一些密切竞争药物的处方增加，从而导致在短期内总阿片类药物处方量没有统计上可检测到的减少。

27519.title: How Much does COVID-19 Increase with Mobility? Evidence from New York and Four Other U.S. Cities
27519.zh_title: 流动性增加在多大程度上加剧了COVID-19？来自纽约及其他四个美国城市的证据
27519.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Caitlin Gorback, Stephen J. Redding
27519.abstract: How effective are restrictions on mobility in limiting COVID-19 spread? Using zip code data across five U.S. cities, we estimate that total cases per capita decrease by 20% for every ten percentage point fall in mobility. Addressing endogeneity concerns, we instrument for travel by residential teleworkable and essential shares and find a 27% decline in cases per capita. Using panel data for NYC with week and zip code fixed effects, we estimate a decline of 17%. We find substantial spatial and temporal heterogeneity; east coast cities have stronger effects, with the largest for NYC in the pandemic’s early stages.
27519.zh_abstract: 限制流动性在遏制COVID-19传播方面效果如何？利用美国五个城市的邮政编码数据，我们估计，流动性每下降十个百分点，人均总病例数减少20%。为解决内生性问题，我们使用住宅可远程办公比例和必需行业份额作为出行工具变量，发现人均病例数下降27%。利用纽约市的周度和邮政编码固定效应面板数据，我们估计下降幅度为17%。我们发现显著的时空异质性；东海岸城市效果更强，其中纽约市在疫情早期阶段效果最大。
27519.meta: Programs：EH, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H12, I12, J17, R41

27518.title: Social Security Reforms and the Changing Retirement Behavior in Germany
27518.zh_title: 社会保障改革与德国退休行为的变迁
27518.authors: Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Johannes Rausch, Nicolas Goll
27518.abstract: As much like other industrialized countries, in recent decades the employment rate in Germany for those aged 55 to 69 had been declining first to considerably rise again afterwards. This paper investigates the role of structural policy changes, in particular reforms of the pension system, since 1980 in explaining this trend reversal. We summarize the institutional changes and pension reforms that may account for the trend reversal, and calculate an “implicit tax on working longer”. We find that for both men and women the increase in the employment rate coincides with a reduction in the early retirement incentive. The reduction of incentives mainly stems from the introduction of actuarial deductions for early retirement and from the abolishment of specific early retirement pathways.
27518.zh_abstract: 与其他工业化国家类似，近几十年来德国55至69岁人群的就业率最初持续下降，随后又显著回升。本文研究了自1980年以来结构性政策变化，特别是养老金体系改革，在解释这一趋势逆转中的作用。我们总结了可能导致趋势逆转的制度变化和养老金改革，并计算了“延长工作的隐性税收”。我们发现，对于男性和女性而言，就业率的上升与提前退休激励的减少相一致。激励的减少主要源于引入提前退休的精算扣减以及取消特定的提前退休途径。

27517.title: The Sensitivity of Cash Savings to the Cost of Capital
27517.zh_title: 现金储蓄对资本成本的敏感性
27517.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Soku Byoun, Zhaoxia Xu
27517.abstract: We theoretically and empirically show that in the presence of a time-varying cost of capital (COC), firms save from external capital when the firm-specific COC is low to hedge against the risk of underinvestment due to a higher COC in the future. This hedging motive drives the sensitivity of cash saving to the COC in both financially constrained and currently unconstrained firms. This sensitivity is especially pronounced among firms that tend to face a higher COC when in need of external finance. These firms with high hedging motives issue excess capital to save cash when the COC is lower. Such cash saving behavior is influenced by future investments.
27517.zh_abstract: 我们从理论和实证上表明，在资本成本随时间变化的情况下，当企业特定资本成本较低时，企业会从外部资本中储蓄，以对冲未来资本成本上升导致的投资不足风险。这种对冲动机驱动了财务受限企业和当前未受限企业现金储蓄对资本成本的敏感性。这种敏感性在那些在需要外部融资时往往面临更高资本成本的企业中尤为显著。这些具有高对冲动机的企业在资本成本较低时发行多余资本以储蓄现金。这种现金储蓄行为受到未来投资的影响。

27516.title: The Lost Generation? Labor Market Outcomes for Post Great Recession Entrants
27516.zh_title: 迷失的一代？大衰退后进入者的劳动力市场结果
27516.abstract: I study cohort patterns in the labor market outcomes of recent college graduates, examining changes surrounding the Great Recession. Recession entrants have lower wages and employment than those of earlier cohorts; more recent cohorts’ employment is even lower, but the newest entrants’ wages have risen. I relate these changes to "scarring" effects of initial conditions. I demonstrate that adverse early conditions permanently reduce new entrants’ employment probabilities. I also replicate earlier results of medium-term scarring effects on wages that fade out by the early 30s. But scarring cannot account for the employment collapse for recent cohorts. There was a dramatic negative structural break in college graduates’ employment rates, beginning around the 2005 entry cohort, that shows no sign of abating.
27516.zh_abstract: 我研究了近期大学毕业生劳动力市场结果的队列模式，考察了大衰退前后的变化。衰退期进入者的工资和就业率低于早期队列；更近期队列的就业率甚至更低，但最新进入者的工资有所上升。我将这些变化与初始条件的“疤痕”效应联系起来。我证明，不利的早期条件永久性地降低了新进入者的就业概率。我还复制了早期关于工资中期疤痕效应的结果，这些效应在30岁出头时逐渐消失。但疤痕效应无法解释近期队列的就业崩溃。大约从2005年进入队列开始，大学毕业生就业率出现了剧烈的负向结构性断裂，且没有减弱的迹象。

27515.title: Testing the Theory of Common Stock Ownership
27515.zh_title: 检验普通股共同所有权理论
27515.abstract: We test if an increase in common ownership changes future expected profits with an event study method. We collect instances of a stock entering the S&P 500 index and identify its product market competitors. We measure the change in institutional and common ownership (with product market rivals) and find that entering stocks experience a significant increase in both. We measure the stock returns of the entrant's product market rivals upon the entry news. We find that increases in common ownership (driven by the whole vector of ownership similarity) cause increases in stock returns, consistent with a hypothesis that common ownership raises profits.
27515.zh_abstract: 我们使用事件研究法检验共同所有权增加是否会改变未来预期利润。我们收集股票进入标普500指数的案例，并识别其产品市场竞争者。我们衡量机构所有权和共同所有权（与产品市场竞争者）的变化，发现进入股票在这两方面均显著增加。我们衡量进入消息公布时进入者产品市场竞争者的股票回报。我们发现，共同所有权（由所有权相似性的整体向量驱动）的增加导致股票回报上升，这与共同所有权提高利润的假设一致。

27514.title: The Association Between Educational Attainment and Longevity using Individual Level Data from the 1940 Census
27514.zh_title: 基于1940年人口普查个体数据的教育程度与寿命关联研究
27514.authors: Adriana Lleras-Muney, Joseph Price, Dahai Yue
27514.abstract: We combine newly released individual data from the 1940 full-count census with death records and other information available in family trees to create the largest individual data to date to study the association between years of schooling and age at death. Conditional on surviving to age 35, one additional year of education is associated with roughly 0.4 more years of life for both men and women for cohorts born 1906-1915. This association is close to linear but exhibits strong credentialing effects, particularly for men, and is substantially smaller for cohorts born earlier. This association varies substantially by state of birth, but it is not smaller in states with higher levels of education or longevity. For men the association is stronger in places with greater incomes, higher quality of school, and larger investments in public health. Women also exhibit great heterogeneity in the association, but our measures of the childhood environment do not explain it.
27514.zh_abstract: 我们将新发布的1940年全量人口普查个体数据与死亡记录及家谱中的其他信息相结合，创建了迄今为止最大的个体数据集，以研究受教育年限与死亡年龄之间的关联。在存活至35岁的条件下，对于1906-1915年出生的队列，每多接受一年教育，男性和女性的寿命大约增加0.4年。这种关联接近线性，但表现出强烈的文凭效应，尤其是对男性而言，并且对于更早出生的队列要小得多。这种关联因出生州而异，但在教育水平或寿命较高的州并不更小。对于男性，这种关联在收入更高、学校质量更好和公共卫生投资更大的地方更强。女性在关联性上也表现出很大的异质性，但我们测量的童年环境指标无法解释这一点。
27514.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, ED, EH, PE；JEL：I10, I20, J10

27513.title: Advancing the Agency of Adolescent Girls
27513.authors: Eric V. Edmonds, Benjamin Feigenberg, Jessica Leight
27513.abstract: Can life skills be taught in early adolescence? Using a clustered randomized control trial, this study analyzes the impact of a school-based life skills intervention in grades six and seven within a sample of 2,459 girls in Rajasthan, India. Our evidence suggests that the intervention is successful in developing stronger life skills including increased agency, more equitable gender norms, and stronger socio-emotional support. Girls also drop out of school at a lower rate: we observe an approximately 25 percent decline in dropout that persists from seventh grade through the transition to high school.
27513.zh_abstract: 生活技能能否在青春期早期教授？通过一项整群随机对照试验，本研究分析了在印度拉贾斯坦邦2459名女孩中，一项基于学校的六年级和七年级生活技能干预的影响。我们的证据表明，该干预成功培养了更强的生活技能，包括增强的自主能力、更公平的性别规范以及更强的社会情感支持。女孩的辍学率也较低：我们观察到辍学率下降约25%，这种下降从七年级持续到向高中过渡的阶段。

27512.title: Has Mortality Risen Disproportionately for the Least Educated?
27512.zh_title: 受教育程度最低群体的死亡率是否不成比例地上升了？
27512.abstract: We examine whether the least educated population groups experienced the worst mortality trends during the 21st century by measuring changes in mortality across education quartiles. We document sharply differing gender patterns. Among women, mortality trends improved fairly monotonically with education. Conversely, male trends for the lowest three education quartiles were often similar. For both sexes, the gap in average mortality between the top 25 percent and the bottom 75 percent is growing. However, there are many groups for whom these average patterns are reversed – with better experiences for the less educated – or where the differences are statistically indistinguishable.
27512.zh_abstract: 我们通过衡量各教育四分位数内死亡率的变化，考察了21世纪受教育程度最低的人群是否经历了最差的死亡率趋势。我们记录了截然不同的性别模式。在女性中，死亡率趋势随教育程度提高而大致单调改善。相反，男性中最低三个教育四分位数的趋势往往相似。对于两性而言，前25%与后75%之间的平均死亡率差距正在扩大。然而，有许多群体这些平均模式是相反的——即受教育程度较低者经历更好——或者差异在统计上无法区分。
27512.meta: Programs：ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, I12, I24, J10

27511.title: Moral Universalism and the Structure of Ideology
27511.zh_title: 道德普遍主义与意识形态结构
27511.authors: Benjamin Enke, Ricardo Rodríguez-Padilla, Florian Zimmermann
27511.abstract: Throughout the Western world, people's policy views are correlated across domains in a strikingly similar fashion. This paper proposes that what partly explains the structure of ideology is moral universalism: the extent to which people's altruism and trust remain constant as social distance increases. In new large-scale multinational surveys, heterogeneity in universalism descriptively explains why the left and right both simultaneously support and oppose different types of government spending. Moreover, the left-right divide on topics such as redistribution strongly depends on whether people evaluate more or less universalist policies. Large-scale donation data provide additional evidence for the political left's universalism.
27511.zh_abstract: 在整个西方世界，人们的政策观点在不同领域之间以惊人的相似方式相互关联。本文提出，部分解释意识形态结构的是道德普遍主义：即人们的利他主义和信任在多大程度上随着社会距离的增加而保持不变。在新的跨国大规模调查中，普遍主义的异质性描述性地解释了为什么左派和右派同时支持并反对不同类型的政府支出。此外，在诸如再分配等议题上的左右分歧，很大程度上取决于人们评估的是更普遍主义还是更不普遍主义的政策。大规模捐赠数据为政治左派的普遍主义提供了额外证据。

27510.title: Using Equity Market Reactions to Infer Exposure to Trade Liberalization
27510.zh_title: 利用股票市场反应推断对贸易自由化的暴露程度
27510.authors: Andrew N. Greenland, Mihai Ion, John W. Lopresti, Peter K. Schott
27510.abstract: We propose a method for identifying exposure to changes in trade policy based on asset prices that has several advantages over standard measures: it encompasses all avenues of exposure, it is natively firm-level, it yields estimates for both goods and service producers, and it can be used to study reductions in difficult-to-quantify non-tariff barriers in a way that controls naturally for broader macroeconomic shocks. Applying our method to two well-studied US trade liberalizations provides new insight into service sector responses to trade liberalizations as well as dramatically different responses among small versus large firms, even within narrow industries.
27510.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于资产价格来识别贸易政策变化暴露程度的方法，该方法相对于标准衡量指标具有若干优势：它涵盖了所有暴露途径，本质上是企业层面的，能为商品和服务生产者提供估计值，并且可用于研究难以量化的非关税壁垒的减少，同时自然地控制了更广泛的宏观经济冲击。将我们的方法应用于两个研究充分的美国贸易自由化案例，为服务业对贸易自由化的反应以及小企业与大型企业之间（即使在狭窄行业内）截然不同的反应提供了新的见解。

27509.title: Linking Changes in Inequality in Life Expectancy and Mortality: Evidence from Denmark and the United States
27509.zh_title: 将预期寿命不平等的变化与死亡率变化联系起来：来自丹麦和美国的证据
27509.authors: Gordon Dahl, Claus Thustrup Kreiner, Torben Heien Nielsen, Benjamin Ly Serena
27509.abstract: We decompose changing gaps in life expectancy between rich and poor into differential changes in age-specific mortality rates and differences in “survivability”. Declining age-specific mortality rates increases life expectancy, but the gain is small if the likelihood of living to this age is small (ex ante survivability) or if the expected remaining lifetime is short (ex post survivability). Lower survivability of the poor explains half of the recent rise in life expectancy inequality in the US and the entire rise in Denmark. Cardiovascular mortality declines favored the poor, but differences in lifestyle-related survivability led inequality to rise.
27509.zh_abstract: 我们将富人与穷人之间预期寿命差距的变化分解为特定年龄死亡率的不同变化和“生存能力”的差异。特定年龄死亡率的下降会增加预期寿命，但如果活到这个年龄的可能性（事前生存能力）很小，或者预期剩余寿命（事后生存能力）很短，那么这种增长就很小。穷人的较低生存能力解释了美国近期预期寿命不平等上升的一半原因，以及丹麦的全部上升原因。心血管疾病死亡率的下降有利于穷人，但与生活方式相关的生存能力差异导致不平等加剧。
27509.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, I14, J11

27508.title: Does the Actuarial Adjustment for Pension Delay Affect Retirement and Claiming Decisions?
27508.zh_title: 延迟领取养老金的精算调整是否影响退休和申领决策？
27508.authors: Devon Gorry, Kyung Min Lee, Sita Slavov
27508.abstract: We investigate the impact of more generous terms for delaying state pensions on claiming and labor supply in the United Kingdom using a 2005 policy change. First, we find that the more generous delay terms reduced the fraction of males receiving pensions at the earliest eligibility age and shortly after. While there are also post-policy changes in women’s claiming behavior, further investigation reveals that these changes do not coincide with the start of the policy and are therefore less likely to be causal effects. Second, we find post-policy increases in labor supply around the earliest pension eligibility age, followed by post-policy decreases in labor supply at older ages. While these labor supply changes cannot easily be separated from longer-term trends, they are consistent with some individuals choosing to work longer to finance pension delay, followed by some individuals retiring earlier due to the income effect from more generous pension benefits. Finally, we find that among individuals who delayed pensions for up to 5 years, about 3 percent of individuals took their gains from delay as lump sums, an option made available under the policy changes.
27508.zh_abstract: 我们利用英国2005年的一项政策变化，研究了延迟领取国家养老金的更优厚条件对申领和劳动力供给的影响。首先，我们发现更优厚的延迟条件减少了在最早合格年龄及之后不久领取养老金的男性比例。虽然女性申领行为在政策变化后也发生了变化，但进一步调查显示，这些变化与政策开始时间并不吻合，因此不太可能是因果效应。其次，我们发现最早养老金合格年龄前后的劳动力供给在政策后有所增加，随后在更年长年龄段劳动力供给在政策后有所下降。虽然这些劳动力供给变化难以与长期趋势区分开来，但它们与一些个体选择工作更长时间以资助延迟养老金，随后一些个体因更优厚养老金福利的收入效应而提前退休的情况是一致的。最后，我们发现，在延迟领取养老金长达5年的个体中，约有3%的人选择以一次性付款的形式领取延迟收益，这是政策变化下提供的一种选择。

27507.title: E-Cigarettes and Respiratory Disease: A Replication, Extension, and Future Directions
27507.zh_title: 电子烟与呼吸系统疾病：一项复制、扩展与未来方向
27507.authors: Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
27507.abstract: Electronic cigarettes show potential to reduce the harms from smoking combustible tobacco, but there is uncertainty about the long-term health consequences. We replicate and extend the study by Bhatta and Glantz (20192), which reports longitudinal statistical associations between e-cigarette use and long-term respiratory disease. We are able to closely replicate their results. When we use a more flexible empirical specification, among respondents who had never smoked combustible tobacco, we find no evidence that current or former e-cigarette use is associated with respiratory disease. The statistical associations between e-cigarette use and respiratory disease are driven by e-cigarette users who are also current or former smokers of combustible tobacco. A striking feature of the data is that almost all e-cigarette users were either current or former smokers of combustible tobacco. We then discuss the potential for future applied econometric research to credibly identify the causal effects of e-cigarette use on health. Challenges include the potential selection biases that stem from the complex set of consumer choices to initiate and quit smoking combustible tobacco, use of e-cigarettes, and dual use of both products. We suggest using a variety of identification strategies to uncover the causal effects that use a variety of econometric methods.
27507.zh_abstract: 电子烟显示出减少吸食可燃烟草危害的潜力，但其长期健康后果存在不确定性。我们复制并扩展了Bhatta和Glantz（2019）的研究，该研究报告了电子烟使用与长期呼吸系统疾病之间的纵向统计关联。我们能够紧密复制他们的结果。当我们使用更灵活的实证规范时，在从未吸食过可燃烟草的受访者中，我们没有发现当前或曾经使用电子烟与呼吸系统疾病相关的证据。电子烟使用与呼吸系统疾病之间的统计关联是由同时是当前或曾经吸食可燃烟草的电子烟使用者驱动的。数据的一个显著特征是，几乎所有电子烟使用者都是当前或曾经吸食可燃烟草的人。然后，我们讨论了未来应用计量经济学研究可信地识别电子烟使用对健康因果效应的潜力。挑战包括潜在的选择性偏差，这些偏差源于消费者开始和戒除吸食可燃烟草、使用电子烟以及同时使用这两种产品的复杂选择集。我们建议使用多种识别策略，利用各种计量经济学方法来揭示因果效应。

27506.title: International Migration Responses to Modern Europe’s Most Destructive Earthquake: Messina and Reggio Calabria, 1908
27506.zh_title: 现代欧洲最具破坏性地震后的国际移民反应：1908年墨西拿与雷焦卡拉布里亚
27506.authors: Yannay Spitzer, Gaspare Tortorici, Ariell Zimran
27506.abstract: The Messina-Reggio Calabria Earthquake (1908) was one of the most devastating natural disasters in modern European history. It occurred when overseas mass emigration from southern Italy was at its peak and international borders were open, making emigration a readily available option for relief. We study the effects of this disaster on international migration. We find that there was no large positive impact on emigration on average. There were, however, heterogeneous responses, with a more positive effect where agricultural day laborers comprised a larger share of the labor force, suggesting that attachment to the land limited an emigration response.
27506.zh_abstract: 墨西拿-雷焦卡拉布里亚地震（1908年）是现代欧洲历史上最具破坏性的自然灾害之一。它发生在意大利南部海外大规模移民达到顶峰且国际边界开放之时，使得移民成为一种现成的救济选择。我们研究了这场灾难对国际移民的影响。我们发现，平均而言，移民并未受到大的正向影响。然而，存在异质性反应，在农业日工占劳动力比例更高的地区，正向效应更为明显，这表明对土地的依恋限制了移民反应。
27506.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS；JEL：F22, J61, N33, N53, O13, O15, Q54

27505.title: Natural Disasters and Elective Medical Services: How Big is the Bounce-Back?
27505.zh_title: 自然灾害与选择性医疗服务：反弹有多大？
27505.authors: Tatyana Deryugina, Jonathan Gruber, Adrienne Sabety
27505.abstract: COVID-19 has created a dual set of stresses on health care systems worldwide: a rise in expensive intensive care services and a dramatic decline in elective services. The U.S. government has responded with both grant and loan programs to help health care providers weather the storm. But the optimal size and nature of such programs are hard to evaluate without an understanding of the ability of providers to make up their lost elective service revenues over time. In this paper, we study the closest relevant parallel to the reduction in elective services seen under COVID-19: hurricanes. We match information on hurricanes to data on Medicare hospital elective visits and charges from 1997-2013, comparing counties impacted by hurricanes to nearby unaffected counties. We find that the average hurricane reduces elective services by about 7% in the month it makes landfall. For the most severe hurricanes, we estimate a reduction of more than 20%. Services return to baseline fairly rapidly, but for severe hurricanes it takes a year or more to make up lost revenues. Projections based on variation in hurricane severity suggest that it will take over 3 years for providers to make up the lost revenue from COVID-19.
27505.zh_abstract: COVID-19给全球医疗系统带来了双重压力：昂贵的重症监护服务需求增加，以及选择性服务急剧下降。美国政府通过拨款和贷款项目来帮助医疗服务提供者渡过难关。但如果不了解提供者随时间弥补选择性服务收入损失的能力，就很难评估此类项目的最佳规模和性质。在本文中，我们研究了与COVID-19下选择性服务减少最接近的相关平行情况：飓风。我们将飓风信息与1997-2013年Medicare医院选择性就诊和收费数据相匹配，比较受飓风影响的县与附近未受影响的县。我们发现，平均而言，飓风在登陆当月使选择性服务减少约7%。对于最严重的飓风，我们估计减少幅度超过20%。服务会相当迅速地恢复到基线水平，但对于严重飓风，需要一年或更长时间才能弥补收入损失。基于飓风严重程度变化的预测表明，提供者需要超过3年时间才能弥补COVID-19造成的收入损失。
27505.meta: Programs：AG, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：H12, I11, Q54

27504.title: Voting and Political Participation in the Aftermath of the HIV/AIDS Epidemic
27504.zh_title: 艾滋病疫情后的投票与政治参与
27504.authors: Hani Mansour, Daniel I. Rees, James M. Reeves
27504.abstract: This is the first study to examine the effect of experiencing a widespread, deadly epidemic on voting behavior. Using data on elections to the U.S House of Representatives and leveraging cross-district variation in HIV/AIDS mortality during the period 1983-1987, we document the effects of the HIV/AIDS epidemic on votes received by Democratic and Republican candidates. Beginning with the 1994 elections, there is a strong, positive association between HIV/AIDS mortality and the vote share received by Democratic candidates. Congressional districts that bore the brunt of the HIV/AIDS epidemic also saw substantial increases in Democratic voter turnout and contributions made to Democratic candidates.
27504.zh_abstract: 这是首次研究经历广泛致命流行病对投票行为的影响。利用美国众议院选举数据，并利用1983-1987年间各地区HIV/AIDS死亡率的差异，我们记录了HIV/AIDS疫情对民主党与共和党候选人得票的影响。从1994年选举开始，HIV/AIDS死亡率与民主党候选人获得的选票份额之间存在强烈的正相关关系。承受HIV/AIDS疫情冲击最严重的国会选区，民主党选民的投票率和向民主党候选人的捐款也出现了显著增长。

27503.title: Technology Adoption and Productivity Growth: Evidence from Industrialization in France
27503.zh_title: 技术采用与生产率增长：来自法国工业化的证据
27503.authors: Réka Juhász, Mara P. Squicciarini, Nico Voigtländer
27503.abstract: New technologies tend to be adopted slowly and – even after being adopted – take time to be reflected in higher aggregate productivity. One prominent explanation for these patterns is the need to reorganize production, which often goes hand-in-hand with major technological breakthroughs. We study a unique setting that allows us to examine the empirical relevance of this explanation: the adoption of mechanized cotton spinning during the First Industrial Revolution in France. The new technology required reorganizing production by moving workers from their homes to the newly-formed factories. Using a novel hand-collected plant-level dataset from French archival sources, we show that productivity growth in mechanized cotton spinning was driven by the disappearance of plants in the lower tail – in contrast to other sectors that did not need to reorganize when new technologies were introduced. We provide evidence that this was driven by organizational challenges such as developing optimal plant layout. A process of ‘trial and error’ led to initially low and widely dispersed productivity, and – in the subsequent decades – to high productivity growth as knowledge diffused through the economy and new entrants adopted improved methods of organizing production.
27503.zh_abstract: 新技术往往被缓慢采用，并且即使在采用之后，也需要时间才能反映在更高的总体生产率中。对这些模式的一个突出解释是需要重组生产，而这通常与重大技术突破相伴而生。我们研究了一个独特的情境，使我们能够检验这一解释的经验相关性：法国第一次工业革命期间机械化棉纺技术的采用。这项新技术要求将工人从家中转移到新成立的工厂，从而重组生产。利用从法国档案资料中手工收集的新颖工厂级数据集，我们表明，机械化棉纺业的生产率增长是由低端工厂的消失驱动的——这与那些在引入新技术时无需重组的其他行业形成对比。我们提供的证据表明，这是由组织挑战（例如开发最佳工厂布局）所驱动的。一个“试错”过程导致了最初的低生产率和广泛的生产率分散，而在随后的几十年里，随着知识在经济中扩散以及新进入者采用改进的生产组织方法，生产率实现了高增长。
27503.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, POL, PR；JEL：F63, N23, O14

27502.title: Can Technology Solve the Principal-Agent Problem? Evidence from ChinaÂ’s War on Air Pollution
27502.zh_title: 技术能解决委托代理问题吗？来自中国“空气污染治理战”的证据
27502.authors: Michael Greenstone, Guojun He, Ruixue Jia, Tong Liu
27502.abstract: We examine the introduction of automatic air pollution monitoring, which is a central feature of China’s “war on pollution.” Exploiting 654 regression discontinuity designs based on city-level variation in the day that monitoring was automated, we find that reported PM₁₀ concentrations increased by 35% immediately post–automation and were sustained. City-level variation in underreporting is negatively correlated with income per capita and positively correlated with true pre-automation PM₁₀ concentrations. Further, automation’s introduction increased online searches for face masks and air filters, suggesting that the biased and imperfect pre-automation information imposed welfare costs by leading to suboptimal purchases of protective goods.
27502.zh_abstract: 我们研究了自动空气污染监测的引入，这是中国“污染治理战”的核心特征。利用基于城市层面监测自动化日期的654个断点回归设计，我们发现，在自动化之后，报告的PM₁₀浓度立即增加了35%，并且这种增加得以持续。城市层面低报程度的差异与人均收入负相关，与自动化前真实的PM₁₀浓度正相关。此外，自动化的引入增加了在线搜索口罩和空气过滤器的次数，这表明自动化前有偏且不完善的信息通过导致防护用品购买不足而造成了福利成本。

27501.title: Going Bankrupt in China
27501.abstract: Using a new case-level dataset we document a set of stylized facts on bankruptcy in China and study how the staggered introduction of specialized courts across Chinese cities aﬀects insolvency resolution and the local economy. For identiﬁcation, we compare bankruptcy cases handled by specialized versus traditional civil courts within the same city and ﬁled in the same year. We ﬁnd that specialized courts decrease case duration by 36% relative to traditional civil courts. We provide evidence consistent with court specialization increasing eﬃciency via selection of better trained judges and higher judicial independence from local politicians. We document that cities introducing specialized courts experience a relative reallocation of employment out of zombie-ﬁrms-intensive sectors, as well as faster ﬁrm entry and a larger increase in average capital productivity.
27501.zh_abstract: 利用一个新的案例层面数据集，我们记录了一组关于中国破产的典型事实，并研究了专业法院在中国各城市分阶段引入如何影响破产解决和当地经济。为了进行识别，我们比较了同一城市内、同一年立案的由专业法院与传统民事法院处理的破产案件。我们发现，相对于传统民事法院，专业法院将案件审理时长缩短了36%。我们提供的证据表明，法院专业化通过选拔训练有素的法官和提高法官相对于地方政治人物的独立性来提高效率。我们记录到，引入专业法院的城市经历了就业从僵尸企业密集型行业向其他行业的相对重新配置，以及更快的企业进入和平均资本生产率的更大提升。

27500.title: Sovereign Credit and Exchange Rate Risks: Evidence from Asia-Pacific Local Currency Bonds
27500.zh_title: 主权信用与汇率风险：来自亚太地区本币债券的证据
27500.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Drew D. Creal, Peter Hördahl
27500.abstract: We study the dynamic properties of sovereign bonds in emerging markets and their associated risk premiums. We focus on the properties of credit spreads, exchange rates, and their interaction. Relying on the term structure of local currency bonds issued by Asia-Pacific sovereigns, we find that local variables are significant in the dynamics of currency and credit risk, and the components of bond risk premiums reflecting these risks. Local currency bonds dramatically improve the investment frontier.
27500.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新兴市场主权债券的动态特性及其相关的风险溢价。我们重点关注信用利差、汇率及其相互作用的特性。基于亚太地区主权国家发行的本币债券的期限结构，我们发现，地方变量在货币风险和信用风险的动态变化以及反映这些风险的债券风险溢价组成部分中具有显著作用。本币债券极大地改善了投资前沿。

27571.title: Understanding the Revenue Potential of Tax Compliance Investment
27571.zh_title: 理解税收合规投资的收入潜力
27571.abstract: In a July 2020 report, the Congressional Budget Office estimated that modest investments in the IRS would generate somewhere between $\$60$ and $\$100$ billion in additional revenue over a decade. This is qualitatively correct. But quantitatively, the revenue potential is much more significant than the CBO report suggests. We highlight five reasons for the CBO’s underestimation: 1) the scale of the investment in the IRS contemplated is modest and far short of sufficient even to return the IRS budget to 2011 levels; 2) the CBO contemplates a limited range of interventions, excluding entirely progress on information reporting and technological advancements; 3) the estimates assume rapidly diminishing returns to marginal increases in investment; 4) the estimates leave out the effect of increased enforcement on taxpayer decision-making; and 5) the use of the 10-year window means that the long-run benefits of increased enforcement are excluded. We discuss these issues, present an alternative calculation, and conclude that a commitment to restoring tax compliance efforts to historical levels could generate over $\$1$ trillion in the next decade.
27571.zh_abstract: 在2020年7月的一份报告中，国会预算办公室估计，对国税局的适度投资将在十年内产生600亿至1000亿美元的额外收入。这在定性上是正确的。但从定量上看，收入潜力比国会预算办公室报告所暗示的要大得多。我们强调了国会预算办公室低估的五个原因：1) 对国税局的投资规模适度，远不足以将国税局预算恢复到2011年的水平；2) 国会预算办公室考虑了一系列有限的干预措施，完全排除了信息报告和技术进步方面的进展；3) 这些估计假设边际投资增加的回报迅速递减；4) 这些估计忽略了加强执法对纳税人决策的影响；5) 使用十年窗口意味着排除了加强执法的长期收益。我们讨论了这些问题，提出了另一种计算方法，并得出结论：将税收合规工作恢复到历史水平的承诺可以在未来十年产生超过1万亿美元的收入。

27570.title: Expanding Access to Clean Water for the Rural Poor: Experimental Evidence from Malawi
27570.zh_title: 扩大农村贫困人口获得清洁用水的机会：来自马拉维的实验证据
27570.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Basimenye Nhlema, Zachary Wagner, Aaron Wolf, Emily Wroe
27570.abstract: Using data from an 18-month randomized trial, we estimate large and sustained impacts on water purification and child health of a program providing monthly coupons for free water treatment solution (diluted chlorine) to households with young children. The program is more effective and much more cost-effective than asking Community Health Workers (CHWs) to distribute free chlorine to households during routine monthly visits. That is because only 40% of households make use of free chlorine, targeting through CHWs is worse than self-targeting through coupon redemption, and water treatment promotion by CHWs does not increase chlorine use among free chlorine beneficiaries. Non- use of free chlorine is driven by households who have a protected water source and those who report that chlorine makes water taste bad.
27570.zh_abstract: 利用一项为期18个月的随机试验数据，我们估计了一项向有幼儿家庭提供每月免费水处理溶液（稀释氯）优惠券的计划对水净化和儿童健康产生了巨大且持续的影响。该计划比要求社区卫生工作者在例行月度访问期间向家庭免费分发氯更有效，且成本效益高得多。这是因为只有40%的家庭使用了免费氯，通过社区卫生工作者的针对性不如通过优惠券兑换的自我针对性，而且社区卫生工作者的水处理推广并未增加免费氯受益者中氯的使用。不使用免费氯的原因在于拥有受保护水源的家庭以及那些报告氯使水味道不好的家庭。

27569.title: Financing Municipal Water and Sanitation Services in Nairobi’s Informal Settlements
27569.zh_title: 为内罗毕非正规住区的市政供水和卫生服务融资
27569.authors: Aidan Coville, Sebastian Galiani, Paul Gertler, Susumu Yoshida
27569.abstract: We estimate the impacts of two interventions implemented as field experiments in informal settlements by Nairobi’s water and sanitation utility to improve revenue collection efficiency and last mile connection loan repayment: (i) face-to-face engagement between utility staff and customers to encourage payment and (ii) contract enforcement for service disconnection due to nonpayment in the form of transparent and credible disconnection notices. While we find no effect of the engagement, we find large effects of enforcement on payment. We also find no effect on access to water, perceptions of utility fairness or quality of service delivery, on the relationships between tenants and property owners, or on tenant mental well-being nine months after the intervention. To counterbalance the increase in payments, property owners increased rental income by renting out additional space. Taken together these results suggest that transparent contract enforcement was effective at improving revenue collection efficiency without incurring large social or political costs.
27569.zh_abstract: 我们估计了内罗毕供水和卫生公用事业公司在非正规住区作为实地实验实施的两项干预措施的影响，旨在提高收入征收效率和最后一英里连接贷款偿还：(i) 公用事业公司员工与客户面对面接触以鼓励付款，以及(ii) 因未付款而中断服务的合同执行，形式为透明且可信的中断通知。虽然我们发现接触没有效果，但我们发现执行对付款有巨大影响。我们也没有发现干预九个月后对用水获取、对公用事业公平性或服务质量交付的看法、租户与业主之间的关系或租户心理健康的影响。为了抵消付款的增加，业主通过出租额外空间增加了租金收入。综合来看，这些结果表明，透明的合同执行有效地提高了收入征收效率，而没有产生巨大的社会或政治成本。

27568.title: Occupational Licensing and Labor Market Fluidity
27568.zh_title: 职业许可与劳动力市场流动性
27568.abstract: We show that occupational licensing has significant negative effects on labor market fluidity defined as cross-occupation mobility. Using a balanced panel of workers constructed from the CPS and SIPP data, we analyze the link between occupational licensing and labor market outcomes. We find that workers with a government-issued occupational license experience churn rates significantly lower than those of non-licensed workers. Specifically, licensed workers are 24% less likely to switch occupations and 3% less likely to become unemployed in the following year. Moreover, occupational licensing represents barriers to entry for both non-employed workers and employed ones. The effect is more prominent for employed workers relative to those entering from nonemployment, because the opportunity cost of acquiring a license is much higher for employed individuals. Lastly, we find that average wage growth is higher for licensed workers than non-licensed workers, whether they stay in the same occupation in the next year or switch occupations. We find significant heterogeneity in the licensing effect across different occupation groups. These results hold across various data sources, time spans, and indicators of being licensed. Overall, licensing could account for almost 8% of the total decline in monthly occupational mobility over the past two decades.
27568.zh_abstract: 我们表明，职业许可对定义为跨职业流动性的劳动力市场流动性具有显著的负面影响。利用从CPS和SIPP数据构建的工人平衡面板，我们分析了职业许可与劳动力市场结果之间的联系。我们发现，持有政府颁发的职业许可证的工人的流动率显著低于无证工人。具体来说，持证工人在下一年更换职业的可能性低24%，失业的可能性低3%。此外，职业许可对非就业工人和就业工人均构成进入壁垒。相对于从非就业状态进入的工人，对就业工人的影响更为显著，因为就业者获得许可证的机会成本要高得多。最后，我们发现，无论持证工人在下一年是留在同一职业还是更换职业，其平均工资增长都高于无证工人。我们发现不同职业群体之间的许可效应存在显著的异质性。这些结果在各种数据来源、时间跨度和持证指标下均成立。总体而言，许可可能解释了在过去二十年中月度职业流动性总下降的近8%。
27568.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H1, J01, J18, J24, J38, J4, J44, J62, J8, J88, K0, K2, K31

27567.title: The Dynamics of the Smoking Wage Penalty
27567.zh_title: 吸烟工资惩罚的动态机制
27567.authors: Michael E. Darden, Julie L. Hotchkiss, M. Melinda Pitts
27567.abstract: Cigarette smokers earn significantly less than nonsmokers, but the magnitude of the smoking wage gap and the pathways by which it originates are unclear. Proposed mechanisms often focus on spot differences in employee productivity or employer preferences, neglecting the dynamic nature of human capital development and addiction. In this paper, we formulate a dynamic model of young workers as they transition from schooling to the labor market, a period in which the lifetime trajectory of wages is being developed. We estimate the model with data from the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth, 1997 Cohort, and we simulate the model under counterfactual scenarios that isolate the contemporaneous effects of smoking from dynamic differences in human capital accumulation and occupational selection. Results from our preferred model, which accounts for unobserved heterogeneity in the joint determination of smoking, human capital, labor supply, and wages, suggest that continued heavy smoking in young adulthood results in a wage penalty at age 30 of 14.8% and 9.3% for women and men, respectively. These differences are less than half of the raw difference in means in wages at age 30. We show that the contemporaneous effect of heavy smoking net of any life-cycle effects explains roughly 67% of the female smoking wage gap but only 11% of the male smoking wage gap.
27567.zh_abstract: 吸烟者的工资显著低于非吸烟者，但吸烟工资差距的规模及其形成路径尚不明确。现有机制通常聚焦于员工生产率或雇主偏好的即时差异，忽视了人力资本积累与成瘾行为的动态特性。本文构建了一个动态模型，刻画年轻工人从学校向劳动力市场过渡的阶段——这一阶段正是终身工资轨迹形成的关键时期。我们利用1997年全国青年纵向调查数据估计模型，并在反事实情景下进行模拟，以分离吸烟的即时效应与人力资本积累及职业选择中的动态差异。我们的首选模型考虑了吸烟、人力资本、劳动力供给和工资联合决定中的未观测异质性，结果表明：青年期持续重度吸烟会导致女性30岁时工资惩罚达14.8%，男性达9.3%。这些差异不到30岁时原始工资均值差异的一半。我们进一步发现，剔除生命周期效应后，重度吸烟的即时效应解释了女性吸烟工资差距的约67%，但仅解释了男性吸烟工资差距的11%。

27566.title: Projecting Unemployment Durations: A Factor-Flows Simulation Approach With Application to the COVID-19 Recession
27566.zh_title: 预测失业持续时间：基于因子-流量模拟的方法及其在COVID-19衰退中的应用
27566.abstract: We propose a three-step factor-flows simulation-based approach to forecast the duration distribution of unemployment. Step 1: estimate individual transition hazards across employment, temporary layoff, permanent layoff, quitter, entrant, and out of the labor force, with each hazard depending on an aggregate component as well as an individual's labor force history. Step 2: relate the aggregate components to the overall unemployment rate using a factor model. Step 3: combine the individual duration dependence, factor structure, and an auxiliary forecast of the unemployment rate to simulate a panel of individual labor force histories. Applying our approach to the July Blue Chip forecast of the COVID-19 recession, we project that 1.6 million workers laid off in April 2020 remain unemployed six months later. Total long-term unemployment rises thereafter and eventually reaches more 4.5 million individuals unemployed for more than 26 weeks and almost 2 million individuals unemployed for more than 46 weeks. Long-term unemployment rises even more in a more pessimistic recovery scenario, but remains below the level in the Great Recession due to a high amount of labor market churn.
27566.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种三步因子-流量模拟方法，用于预测失业持续时间的分布。第一步：估计个体在就业、临时解雇、永久解雇、自愿离职、新进入者和退出劳动力市场之间的转换风险，每个风险取决于一个总体成分以及个体的劳动力市场历史。第二步：利用因子模型将总体成分与整体失业率联系起来。第三步：结合个体持续时间依赖性、因子结构以及失业率的辅助预测，模拟一个包含个体劳动力市场历史的面板数据。我们将该方法应用于2020年7月蓝筹对COVID-19衰退的预测，结果显示：2020年4月被解雇的工人中，有160万人在六个月后仍处于失业状态。此后，长期失业总人数上升，最终超过450万人失业超过26周，近200万人失业超过46周。在更悲观的复苏情景下，长期失业人数进一步上升，但由于劳动力市场的高流动性，其水平仍低于大衰退时期。

27565.title: Firms, Failures, and Fluctuations: The Macroeconomics of Supply Chain Disruptions
27565.zh_title: 企业、失败与波动：供应链中断的宏观经济学
27565.abstract: This paper studies how firm failures and the resulting disruptions to supply chains can amplify negative shocks. We develop a non-competitive model where customized supplier-customer relations increase productivity, and the relationship-specific surplus generated between firms and their suppliers is divided via bargaining. Changes in productivity alter the distribution of surplus throughout the economy and determine which firms are at the margin of failure. A firm’s failure may spread to its suppliers and customers and to firms in other parts of the production network. We provide existence, uniqueness, and a series of comparative statics results, and show how the response of the equilibrium production network may propagate recessionary shocks.
27565.zh_abstract: 本文研究企业失败及其导致的供应链中断如何放大负面冲击。我们构建了一个非竞争性模型，其中定制化的供应商-客户关系提高了生产率，而企业与供应商之间产生的特定关系剩余通过讨价还价进行分配。生产率的变化会改变整个经济中剩余的分布，并决定哪些企业处于失败边缘。一家企业的失败可能蔓延至其供应商和客户，以及生产网络中其他部分的企业。我们提供了存在性、唯一性以及一系列比较静态分析结果，并展示了均衡生产网络的响应如何可能传导衰退冲击。

27564.title: The Spillover Impact of Index Insurance on Agricultural Investment by Cotton Farmers in Burkina Faso
27564.zh_title: 指数保险对布基纳法索棉农农业投资的溢出效应
27564.authors: Quentin Stoeffler, Michael Carter, Catherine Guirkinger, Wouter Gelade
27564.abstract: This paper examines whether agricultural insurance can boost investment by small scale farmers in West Africa. We conduct a randomized evaluation to analyze the impacts of index insurance for cotton farmers in Burkina Faso. We find no impact of insurance on cotton, but, consistent with microeconomic theory, we find significant spillover impacts on investment in other agricultural activities. Furthermore, the effects of insurance payouts on farmers hit by a shock confirm the potential of index insurance as a risk-management tool. However, we uncover important flaws in the implementation of the project that limited its impacts. Overall, this study suggests a promising role of index insurance for stimulating investment, but also draws attention to key challenges for an efficient delivery of insurance to small farmers. Finally, the hybrid, mixed methods RCT design that we employ offers lessons for the evaluation of complex interventions where trust, understanding and timing are all important.
27564.zh_abstract: 本文考察农业保险能否促进西非小农户的投资。我们通过随机评估分析指数保险对布基纳法索棉农的影响。研究发现，保险对棉花生产没有影响，但与微观经济理论一致，我们发现保险对其他农业活动的投资产生了显著的溢出效应。此外，保险赔付对遭受冲击农户的影响证实了指数保险作为风险管理工具的潜力。然而，我们揭示了项目实施中的重大缺陷，这些缺陷限制了其影响。总体而言，本研究表明指数保险在刺激投资方面具有前景，但也指出了向小农户有效提供保险的关键挑战。最后，我们采用的混合方法随机对照试验设计，为评估信任、理解和时机均重要的复杂干预措施提供了经验教训。

27563.title: Insurance Design and Pharmaceutical Innovation
27563.authors: Leila Agha, Soomi Kim, Danielle Li
27563.abstract: This paper studies how insurance coverage policies impact pharmaceutical innovation. In the United States, most patients obtain prescription drugs through insurance plans administered by Pharmacy Beneﬁt Managers (PBMs). Beginning in 2012, PBMs began excluding coverage for many newly approved drugs when cheaper alternatives were available. Relative to ﬁrms’ existing practices, we show that exclusions substantially reduced insurance claims for targeted drugs, lowering their proﬁtability. This new risk of coverage exclusion reshaped upstream pharmaceutical R&D: for every 1 standard deviation increase in drug class exclusion risk, we estimate an 11% decline in subsequent development activity. This change translated into a relative decline in the development of drug candidates that appear more incremental: that is, those in drug classes with more pre-existing therapies and with less scientiﬁcally novel research.
27563.zh_abstract: 本文研究保险覆盖政策如何影响制药创新。在美国，大多数患者通过由药品福利管理公司管理的保险计划获取处方药。自2012年起，当有更便宜的替代品可用时，药品福利管理公司开始排除许多新获批药物的覆盖。相对于企业现有的做法，我们发现排除政策大幅减少了目标药物的保险索赔，降低了其盈利能力。这种覆盖排除的新风险重塑了上游制药研发：药物类别排除风险每增加一个标准差，后续开发活动估计下降11%。这一变化转化为更渐进式候选药物开发的相对减少：即那些存在于已有更多疗法且科学研究新颖性较低的药物类别中的候选药物。
27563.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I11, O31, O32, O33, O38

27562.title: Unintended Consequences of Lockdowns: COVID-19 and the Shadow Pandemic
27562.zh_title: 封锁的意外后果：COVID-19与影子疫情
27562.abstract: Violence against women is a problem worldwide, with economic costs ranging from 1-4% of global GDP. Using variation in the intensity of government-mandated lock-downs in India, we show that domestic violence complaints increase 0.47 SD in districts with the strictest lockdown rules. We find similarly large increases in cyber-crime complaints. However, rape and sexual assault complaints decrease 0.4 SD in districts with the strictest lockdowns, consistent with decreased female mobility in public spaces, public transport, and workplaces. Longer-term analysis shows that in-creases in domestic violence complaints persist one year later, while other complaints related to rape, sexual assault, and cybercrimes return to pre-lockdown levels.
27562.zh_abstract: 针对女性的暴力是一个全球性问题，其经济成本占全球GDP的1%至4%。利用印度政府强制封锁强度的差异，我们发现在封锁最严格的地区，家庭暴力投诉增加了0.47个标准差。网络犯罪投诉也出现了类似的大幅增长。然而，在封锁最严格的地区，强奸和性侵犯投诉减少了0.4个标准差，这与女性在公共场所、公共交通和工作场所流动性降低相一致。长期分析表明，家庭暴力投诉的增加在一年后仍然持续，而与强奸、性侵犯和网络犯罪相关的其他投诉则恢复到封锁前水平。
27562.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I15, I18, J12, J16, O15

27561.title: A Brief Introduction to Human Capital Measures
27561.zh_title: 人力资本度量方法简介
27561.abstract: There are six major measures of human capital, each of which covers at least 130 countries, all of which are described in this paper. These measures are of two distinct types: monetary and index-based. The two monetary versions are those by the World Bank (Lange et al., 2018) and by the United Nations Environmental Program and the Urban Institute of Kyushu University (Managi and Kumar et al., 2018). The four indicator versions are by the Institute of Health Metrics and Evaluation of the University of Washington (Lim et al., 2018), the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP, 2019), the World Bank (International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the World Bank, 2018), and the World Economic Forum (World Economic Forum, 2017). In addition to describing each of these six measures, this paper compares them using ranking (Spearman) and level (Pearson) correlations. This paper was written as an introduction to a forthcoming book (Fraumeni, Barbara M., ed., Measuring Human Capital, Academic Press, Cambridge, MA) on human capital in order to help statisticians, researchers, analysts, policy-makers and government officials make an informed choice about which to use as this decision can matter.
27561.zh_abstract: 目前有六种主要的人力资本度量方法，每种方法至少覆盖130个国家，本文对它们进行了描述。这些度量方法分为两种类型：货币型和指数型。两种货币型版本分别由世界银行以及联合国环境规划署与九州大学城市研究所编制。四种指数型版本分别由华盛顿大学健康指标与评估研究所、联合国开发计划署、世界银行和世界经济论坛编制。除了描述这六种度量方法外，本文还使用秩相关和水平相关进行了比较。本文是为即将出版的关于人力资本的书籍所写的引言，旨在帮助统计学家、研究人员、分析师、政策制定者和政府官员在做出可能影响结果的决策时，能够做出明智的选择。

27560.title: Measuring Movement and Social Contact with Smartphone Data: A Real-Time Application to COVID-19
27560.zh_title: 利用智能手机数据测量移动与社会接触：COVID-19的实时应用
27560.authors: Victor Couture, Jonathan I. Dingel, Allison E. Green, Jessie Handbury, Kevin R. Williams
27560.abstract: Tracking human activity in real time and at fine spatial scale is particularly valuable during episodes such as the COVID-19 pandemic. In this paper, we discuss the suitability of smartphone data for quantifying movement and social contact. We show that these data cover broad sections of the US population and exhibit movement patterns similar to conventional survey data. We develop and make publicly available a location exposure index that summarizes county-to-county movements and a device exposure index that quantifies social contact within venues. We use these indices to document how pandemic-induced reductions in activity vary across people and places.
27560.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行等事件中，实时且精细空间尺度地追踪人类活动尤为有价值。本文讨论了智能手机数据在量化移动和社会接触方面的适用性。我们表明，这些数据覆盖了美国人口的广泛群体，并展现出与传统调查数据相似的移动模式。我们开发并公开了一个汇总县际移动的位置暴露指数，以及一个量化场所内社会接触的设备暴露指数。我们利用这些指数记录了疫情导致的活动减少如何在不同人群和地点之间存在差异。

27559.title: Financial Fragility in the COVID-19 Crisis: The Case of Investment Funds in Corporate Bond Markets
27559.zh_title: 新冠疫情危机中的金融脆弱性：公司债券市场投资基金案例
27559.authors: Antonio Falato, Itay Goldstein, Ali Hortaçsu
27559.abstract: In the decade following the financial crisis of 2008, investment funds in corporate bond markets became prominent market players and generated concerns of financial fragility. The COVID-19 crisis provides an opportunity to inspect their resilience in a major stress event. Using daily microdata, we document major outflows in corporate-bond funds during the COVID-19 crisis. Large outflows were sustained over weeks and most severe for funds with illiquid assets, vulnerable to fire sales, and exposed to sectors hurt by the crisis. By providing a liquidity backstop for their bond holdings, the Federal Reserve bond purchase program helped to reverse outflows especially for the most fragile funds. In turn, the program had spillover effects on primary market issuance and peer funds. The evidence points to a "bond-fund fragility channel" whereby the Fed liquidity backstop transmits to the real economy via funds.
27559.zh_abstract: 在2008年金融危机后的十年里，公司债券市场的投资基金成为重要的市场参与者，并引发了关于金融脆弱性的担忧。新冠疫情危机为检验这些基金在重大压力事件中的韧性提供了机会。利用每日微观数据，我们记录了新冠疫情危机期间公司债券基金的大规模资金外流。大规模资金外流持续数周，且对于持有非流动性资产、易受抛售影响以及暴露于受危机冲击行业的基金而言最为严重。美联储的债券购买计划通过为其债券持仓提供流动性支持，帮助逆转了资金外流，尤其是对最脆弱的基金而言。反过来，该计划对一级市场发行和同行基金产生了溢出效应。证据指向一种“债券基金脆弱性渠道”，即美联储的流动性支持通过基金传导至实体经济。
27559.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：G01, G1, G23, G38

27558.title: China’s Foreign Trade and Investment, 1800-1950
27558.zh_title: 中国的对外贸易与投资，1800-1950
27558.abstract: The First Opium War (1840-42) was a watershed in the history of China. In its aftermath Britain and other countries forced open new ports to foreign trade through international treaties. Chinese institutions of trade were abolished and re-organized under Western management, Western legal institutions were introduced in China in form of courts and legal practices, and foreigners in China were tried according to the laws of their country of origin (extraterritoriality). To better understand the implications of these changes during the Treaty Port Era (1842-1943), we begin by discussing the attitudes towards foreign trade before 1840 for both China and the West. Drawing on information from the foreign-led Chinese Maritime Customs organization, we provide a synopsis of China’s foreign trade and investment both in terms of patterns and volumes. The paper highlights the link between foreign and domestic trade as well as the important role of new, previously not traded goods for welfare. Employing several outcome measures, we show that Western influence generated significant benefits to China’s economy, and the results suggest that the geographic scope of these benefits reached into areas far beyond the treaty ports.
27558.zh_abstract: 第一次鸦片战争（1840-42年）是中国历史上的一个分水岭。战后，英国和其他国家通过国际条约迫使中国开放新的通商口岸。中国的贸易制度被废除，并在西方管理下重组；西方法律制度以法院和法律实践的形式引入中国；在华外国人按其原籍国法律受审（治外法权）。为了更好地理解这些变化在条约口岸时代（1842-1943年）的影响，我们首先讨论了1840年前中国和西方对对外贸易的态度。利用由外国人主导的中国海关总税务司署的信息，我们从模式和数量两方面概述了中国的对外贸易与投资。本文强调了国内外贸易之间的联系，以及此前未交易的新商品对福利的重要作用。通过采用多种结果衡量指标，我们表明西方影响为中国经济带来了显著收益，且结果表明这些收益的地理范围远远超出了条约口岸地区。
27558.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：F1, F2, N15, O1

27557.title: A Graphical Lasso Approach to Estimating Network Connections: The Case of U.S. Lawmakers
27557.zh_title: 估计网络连接的图形套索方法：以美国立法者为例
27557.authors: Marco Battaglini, Forrest W. Crawford, Eleonora Patacchini, Sida Peng
27557.abstract: In this paper, we propose a new approach to the estimation of social networks and we apply it to the estimation of productivity spillovers in the U.S. Congress. Social networks such as the social connections among lawmakers are not generally directly observed, they can be recovered only using the observable outcomes that they contribute to determine (such as, for example, the legislators’ effectiveness). Moreover, they are typically stable for relatively short periods of time, thus generating only short panels of observations. Our estimator has three appealing properties that allows it to work in these environments. First, it is constructed for “small” asymptotic, thus requiring only short panels of observations. Second, it requires relatively nonrestrictive sparsity assumptions for identification, thus being applicable to dense networks with (potentially) star shaped connections. Third, it allows for heterogeneous common shocks across subnetworks. The application to the U.S. Congress gives us new insights about the nature of social interactions among lawmakers. We estimate a significant decrease over time in the importance of productivity spillovers among individual lawmakers, compensated by an increase in the party level common shock over time. This suggests that the rise of partisanship is not affecting only the ideological position of legislators when they vote, but more generally how lawmakers collaborate in the U.S. Congress.
27557.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提出了一种估计社交网络的新方法，并将其应用于美国国会中生产力溢出效应的估计。社交网络，例如立法者之间的社会联系，通常无法直接观测，只能通过它们有助于决定的、可观测的结果（例如立法者的效率）来恢复。此外，它们在相对较短的时间内通常是稳定的，因此仅产生短面板观测数据。我们的估计量具有三个吸引人的特性，使其能够在这些环境中发挥作用。首先，它针对“小”渐近性而构建，因此仅需要短面板观测数据。其次，它在识别上要求相对非限制性的稀疏性假设，因此适用于具有（潜在）星形连接的密集网络。第三，它允许子网络之间存在异质性共同冲击。对美国国会的应用使我们获得了关于立法者之间社会互动本质的新见解。我们估计，个体立法者之间生产力溢出效应的重要性随时间显著下降，而政党层面的共同冲击则随时间上升。这表明党派主义的兴起不仅影响立法者投票时的意识形态立场，而且更普遍地影响了立法者在美国国会中的合作方式。

27556.title: Bounds on a Slope from Size Restrictions on Economic Shocks
27556.zh_title: 基于经济冲击规模限制的斜率边界
27556.authors: Marco Stenborg Petterson, David G. Seim, Jesse M. Shapiro
27556.abstract: We study the problem of learning about the effect of one market-level variable (e.g., price) on another (e.g., quantity) in the presence of shocks to unobservables (e.g., preferences). We show that economic intuitions about the plausible size of the shocks can be informative about the parameter of interest. We illustrate with a main application to the grain market.
27556.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在存在不可观测因素（如偏好）冲击的情况下，了解一个市场层面变量（如价格）对另一个变量（如数量）影响的问题。我们表明，关于冲击合理规模的经济直觉可以为感兴趣的参数提供信息。我们通过一个主要应用于谷物市场的例子加以说明。

27555.title: Inequality in Household Adaptation to Schooling Shocks: Covid-Induced Online Learning Engagement in Real Time
27555.zh_title: 家庭适应学校冲击的不平等：新冠疫情引发的在线学习参与实时研究
27555.authors: Andrew Bacher-Hicks, Joshua Goodman, Christine Mulhern
27555.abstract: We use high frequency internet search data to study in real time how US households sought out online learning resources as schools closed due to the Covid-19 pandemic. By April 2020, nationwide search intensity for both school- and parent-centered online learning resources had roughly doubled relative to pre-Covid levels. Areas of the country with higher income, better internet access and fewer rural schools saw substantially larger increases in search intensity. The pandemic will likely widen achievement gaps along these dimensions given schools’ and parents’ differing engagement with online resources to compensate for lost school-based learning time. Accounting for such differences and promoting more equitable access to online learning could improve the effectiveness of education policy responses to the pandemic. The public availability of internet search data allows our analyses to be updated when schools reopen and to be replicated in other countries.
27555.zh_abstract: 我们利用高频互联网搜索数据，实时研究了美国因新冠疫情学校关闭时，家庭如何寻求在线学习资源。到2020年4月，全国范围内针对学校和家长中心的在线学习资源的搜索强度相比疫情前水平大约翻了一番。收入较高、互联网接入更好、农村学校较少的地区，搜索强度增幅显著更大。鉴于学校和家长在利用在线资源弥补学校学习时间损失方面的参与程度不同，疫情可能会沿着这些维度扩大成就差距。考虑这些差异并促进更公平地获取在线学习资源，可以提高教育政策应对疫情的有效性。互联网搜索数据的公开性使得我们的分析可以在学校重新开放时更新，并在其他国家复制。

27554.title: Should the Randomistas (Continue to) Rule?
27554.zh_title: 随机主义者应该（继续）主导吗？
27554.abstract: The rising popularity of randomized controlled trials (RCTs) in development applications has come with continuing debates about the merits of this approach. The paper takes stock of the issues. It argues that an unconditional preference for RCTs is questionable on three main counts. First, the case for such a preference is unclear on a priori grounds. For example, with a given budget, even a biased observational study can come closer to the truth than a costly RCT. Second, the ethical objections to RCTs have not been properly addressed by advocates. Third, there is a risk of distorting the evidence-base for informing policymaking, given that an insistence on RCTs generates selection bias in what gets evaluated. Going forward, pressing knowledge gaps should drive the questions asked and how they are answered, not the methodological preferences of some researchers. The gold standard is the best method for the question at hand.
27554.zh_abstract: 随机对照试验在发展应用中的日益普及伴随着关于该方法优点的持续辩论。本文对相关问题进行了评估。它认为，对随机对照试验的无条件偏好存在三个主要问题。首先，这种偏好的理由在先验基础上并不明确。例如，在给定预算下，即使是有偏的观察性研究也可能比昂贵的随机对照试验更接近真相。其次，随机对照试验的伦理反对意见尚未得到倡导者的适当回应。第三，存在扭曲为政策制定提供信息证据基础的风险，因为坚持随机对照试验会导致被评估内容的选择性偏差。展望未来，紧迫的知识空白应驱动所提出的问题及其解答方式，而非某些研究者的方法论偏好。黄金标准是针对当前问题的最佳方法。

27553.title: An Ounce of Prevention
27553.abstract: I look at prevention through an economic lens and make three main points. First, those advocating preventive measures are often asked how much money a given measure saves. This question is misguided. Rather preventive measures can be thought of as insurance, with a certain cost in the present that may or may not pay off in the future. In fact, although most medical preventive measures improve expected health, they do not save money. Various lifestyle and early childhood interventions, however, may both save money and improve health. Second, preventive measures, including medical and lifestyle measures, are heterogeneous in their value, both across measures and, within measure, across individuals. As a result, generalizations in everyday discourse about the value of prevention can be overly broad. Third, health insurance coverage for medical preventive measures should generally be more extensive than coverage for the treatment of a medical condition, though full coverage of preventive services is not necessarily optimal.
27553.zh_abstract: 我从经济学的角度审视预防，并提出三个主要观点。首先，倡导预防措施的人经常被问及某项措施能节省多少钱。这个问题是误导性的。相反，预防措施可以被视为保险，当前有确定的成本，但未来可能不会带来回报。事实上，尽管大多数医疗预防措施能改善预期健康，但它们并不省钱。然而，各种生活方式和儿童早期干预措施可能既省钱又改善健康。其次，预防措施，包括医疗和生活方式措施，其价值在不同措施之间以及同一措施的不同个体之间是异质的。因此，日常话语中关于预防价值的概括可能过于宽泛。第三，医疗预防措施的医疗保险覆盖范围通常应比医疗状况治疗的覆盖范围更广，尽管预防服务的全额覆盖并不一定是最优的。

27552.title: Wealth, Race, and Consumption Smoothing of Typical Income Shocks
27552.zh_title: 财富、种族与典型收入冲击下的消费平滑
27552.authors: Peter Ganong, Damon Jones, Pascal J. Noel, Fiona E. Greig, Diana Farrell, Chris Wheat
27552.abstract: We study the consumption response to typical labor income shocks and investigate how these vary by wealth and race. First, we develop an instrument based on firm-wide changes in labor income. Household income volatility stems mostly from fluctuations in labor income and this research design therefore studies the sort of income fluctuations that households typically experience from month to month. Using administrative banking data, we find an average elasticity of 0.21, with a much higher elasticity for low-liquidity households and close to zero elasticity for high-liquidity households. In a stylized model calibrated to our estimates, this degree of sensitivity implies that temporary income volatility has a large welfare cost for the average household, and especially large costs for low-liquidity households. Second, we use this instrument to study how wealth shapes racial inequality. Although an extensive body of work documents the long-term persistence of the racial wealth gap, less is known about its consequences on households’ lives from month to month. We find that Black and Hispanic households are twice as sensitive to typical income shocks as White households. Nearly all of this difference is explained in a statistical sense by racial wealth inequality. Because of racial disparities in consumption smoothing, the welfare cost of temporary income volatility is twice as high for Black and Hispanic households than for White households.
27552.zh_abstract: 我们研究了消费对典型劳动收入冲击的反应，并调查了这些反应如何随财富和种族而变化。首先，我们开发了一个基于企业层面劳动收入变化的工具变量。家庭收入波动主要源于劳动收入的波动，因此本研究设计考察了家庭通常每月经历的那种收入波动。利用行政银行数据，我们发现平均弹性为0.21，低流动性家庭的弹性要高得多，而高流动性家庭的弹性接近于零。在一个根据我们的估计校准的简化模型中，这种敏感度意味着临时收入波动对普通家庭具有巨大的福利成本，对低流动性家庭尤其如此。其次，我们利用这个工具变量研究财富如何塑造种族不平等。尽管大量文献记录了种族财富差距的长期持续性，但对其在家庭每月生活中后果的了解较少。我们发现，黑人和西班牙裔家庭对典型收入冲击的敏感度是白人家庭的两倍。在统计意义上，这种差异几乎完全由种族财富不平等解释。由于消费平滑方面的种族差异，临时收入波动的福利成本对黑人和西班牙裔家庭而言是白人家庭的两倍。
27552.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E21, J15, J65

27551.title: Mutual Fund Performance and Flows During the COVID-19 Crisis
27551.zh_title: 新冠疫情危机中的共同基金表现与资金流动
27551.abstract: We present a comprehensive analysis of the performance and flows of U.S. actively-managed equity mutual funds during the COVID-19 crisis of 2020. We find that most active funds underperform passive benchmarks during the crisis, contradicting a popular hypothesis. Funds with high sustainability ratings perform well, as do funds with high star ratings. Fund out ows surpass pre-crisis trends, but not dramatically. Investors favor funds that apply exclusion criteria and funds with high sustainability ratings, especially environmental ones. Our finding that investors remain focused on sustainability during this major crisis suggests they view sustainability as a necessity rather than a luxury good.
27551.zh_abstract: 我们对2020年新冠疫情危机期间美国主动管理型股票共同基金的表现与资金流动进行了全面分析。研究发现，大多数主动型基金在危机期间表现逊于被动基准指数，这与一种流行的假设相悖。高可持续性评级的基金表现良好，高星级评级的基金同样如此。基金资金流出超过了危机前的趋势，但幅度并不显著。投资者青睐采用排除标准的基金以及高可持续性评级的基金，尤其是环境类基金。我们的发现表明，投资者在这场重大危机中仍关注可持续性，这暗示他们将可持续性视为必需品而非奢侈品。
27551.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G01, G11, G12, G14, G23

27550.title: Federal Aid to School Districts During the COVID-19 Recession
27550.zh_title: 新冠疫情衰退期间对学区的联邦援助
27550.authors: Nora E. Gordon, Sarah J. Reber
27550.abstract: The coronavirus has created an enormous—and expensive—challenge for elementary and secondary schools, while simultaneously depleting the revenue sources on which public schools depend. During the Great Recession, the federal government filled in a significant share of lost revenue. In contrast, the federal response to date has been limited. If Congress decides to invest in future generations, it faces a range of options for how to structure an aid package. One key aspect for any stabilization package is how federal funds should be allocated to states. We consider the types of approaches used in recent proposals, during the Great Recession, and at the onset of the COVID-19 crisis, as well as in major ongoing federal education programs for compensatory and special education.
