We simulate the distribution of funds and show the considerable difference in how per-child allocations correlate with child poverty rates under the most likely alternative approaches.
27550.zh_abstract: 新冠病毒为中小学教育带来了巨大且昂贵的挑战，同时耗尽了公立学校赖以生存的收入来源。在大衰退期间，联邦政府填补了很大一部分收入损失。相比之下，迄今为止的联邦应对措施有限。如果国会决定投资于后代，它在如何构建援助方案上面临一系列选择。任何稳定方案的一个关键方面是联邦资金应如何分配给各州。我们考虑了近期提案、大衰退期间、新冠疫情危机初期以及现行主要联邦补偿教育和特殊教育项目中采用的方法类型。我们模拟了资金分配情况，并展示了在最可能的替代方法下，人均拨款与儿童贫困率之间的相关性存在显著差异。

27549.title: Inequality and the Coronavirus: Socioeconomic Covariates of Behavioral Responses and Viral Outcomes Across US Counties
27549.zh_title: 不平等与新冠病毒：美国各县行为反应和病毒结果的社会经济协变量
27549.abstract: Not much is obvious about how socioeconomic inequalities impact the spread of infectious diseases once one considers behavioral responses, correlations among multiple covariates and the likely non-linearities and dynamics involved. Social distancing responses to the threat of catching COVID-19 and outcomes for infections and deaths are modelled across US counties, augmenting epidemiological and health covariates with within-county median incomes, poverty and income inequality, and age and racial composition. Systematic socioeconomic effects on social distancing and infections emerge, and most effects do not fade as the virus spreads. Deaths, once infected, are less responsive to socioeconomic covariates. Richer counties tend to see greater gains in social distancing and lower infection rates, controlling for more standard epidemiological factors. Income poverty and inequality tend to increase the infection rate, but these effects are largely accountable to their correlation with racial composition. A more elderly population increases deaths conditional on infections, but has an offsetting effect on the infection rate, consistent with the behavioral responses we find through social distancing.
27549.zh_abstract: 一旦考虑行为反应、多个协变量之间的相关性以及可能涉及的非线性和动态因素，社会经济不平等如何影响传染病传播就并不明显。我们模拟了美国各县对感染新冠病毒威胁的社交距离反应以及感染和死亡结果，在流行病学和健康协变量基础上增加了县内收入中位数、贫困率、收入不平等以及年龄和种族构成。社交距离和感染方面出现了系统性的社会经济效应，且大多数效应并未随着病毒传播而减弱。一旦感染，死亡对社会经济协变量的反应较弱。在控制更标准的流行病学因素后，较富裕的县往往在社交距离方面取得更大进展，感染率也更低。收入贫困和不平等倾向于提高感染率，但这些效应很大程度上可归因于它们与种族构成的相关性。老年人口比例较高会增加感染后的死亡风险，但对感染率有抵消效应，这与我们通过社交距离发现的行为反应一致。

27548.title: Hard and Soft Skills in Vocational Training: Experimental Evidence from Colombia
27548.zh_title: 职业培训中的硬技能与软技能：来自哥伦比亚的实验证据
27548.authors: Felipe Barrera-Osorio, Adriana D. Kugler, Mikko I. Silliman
27548.abstract: We randomly assign applicants to over-subscribed programs to study the effects of teaching hard and soft skills in vocational training and examine their impacts on skills and labor market outcomes using both survey and administrative data. We find that providing vocational training that either emphasizes social or technical skills increases formal employment. We also find that admission to a vocational program that emphasizes technical relative to social skills increases overall employment and also days and hours worked in the short term. Yet, emphasis on soft-skills training helps applicants sustain employment and monthly wages over the longer term and allows them to catch up with those learning hard skills. Further, through a second round of randomization, we find that offering financial support for transportation and food increases the effectiveness of the program, indicating that resource constraints may be an obstacle for individuals considering vocational training.
27548.zh_abstract: 我们随机分配申请者至超额认购的项目，以研究职业培训中教授硬技能和软技能的效果，并利用调查和行政数据考察其对技能和劳动力市场结果的影响。我们发现，提供强调社交技能或技术技能的职业培训均能增加正规就业。我们还发现，被录取到强调技术技能而非社交技能的职业项目，短期内能提高总体就业率以及工作天数和小时数。然而，软技能培训的强调有助于申请者长期维持就业和月工资，并使他们能够赶上学习硬技能的人。此外，通过第二轮随机化，我们发现提供交通和食品的财政支持能提高项目的有效性，这表明资源约束可能是个人考虑职业培训的一个障碍。
27548.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：C21, I25, I26, J24, J60, O54

27547.title: Bank Complexity, Governance, and Risk
27547.zh_title: 银行复杂性、治理与风险
27547.abstract: Bank holding companies (BHCs) can be complex organizations, conducting multiple lines of business through many distinct legal entities and across a range of geographies. While such complexity raises the costs of bank resolution when organizations fail, the effect of complexity on BHCs' broader risk profile is less well understood. Business, organizational, and geographic complexity can engender explicit trade-offs between the agency problems that increase risk and the diversification, liquidity management, and synergy improvements that reduce risk. The outcomes of such trade-offs may depend on bank governance arrangements. We test these conjectures using data on large U.S. BHCs for the 1996-2018 period. Organizational complexity and geographic scope tend to provide diversification gains and reduce idiosyncratic and liquidity risks while also increasing BHCs' exposure to systematic and systemic risks. Regulatory changes focused on organizational complexity have significantly reduced this type of complexity, leading to a decrease in systemic risk and an increase in liquidity risk among BHCs. While bank governance structures have, in some cases, significantly affected the buildup of BHC complexity, better governance arrangements have not moderated the effects of complexity on risk outcomes.
27547.zh_abstract: 银行控股公司（BHC）可能是复杂的组织，通过许多不同的法律实体和跨地域开展多条业务线。虽然这种复杂性在组织倒闭时增加了银行处置的成本，但复杂性对BHC更广泛风险状况的影响尚不明确。业务、组织和地理复杂性可能引发增加风险的代理问题与降低风险的多元化、流动性管理和协同效应之间的明确权衡。这种权衡的结果可能取决于银行治理安排。我们利用1996-2018年间美国大型BHC的数据检验了这些假设。组织复杂性和地理范围往往提供多元化收益，降低特质风险和流动性风险，同时增加BHC对系统性风险和系统风险的暴露。专注于组织复杂性的监管变化显著降低了这种类型的复杂性，导致BHC的系统性风险下降和流动性风险上升。虽然银行治理结构在某些情况下显著影响了BHC复杂性的积累，但更好的治理安排并未缓和复杂性对风险结果的影响。

27546.title: Policy Evaluation with Multiple Instrumental Variables
27546.zh_title: 使用多个工具变量的政策评估
27546.authors: Magne Mogstad, Alexander Torgovitsky, Christopher R. Walters
27546.abstract: Marginal treatment effect methods are widely used for causal inference and policy evaluation with instrumental variables. However, they fundamentally rely on the well-known monotonicity (threshold-crossing) condition on treatment choice behavior. Recent research has shown that this condition cannot hold with multiple instruments unless treatment choice is effectively homogeneous. Based on these findings, we develop a new marginal treatment effect framework under a weaker, partial monotonicity condition. The partial monotonicity condition is implied by standard choice theory and allows for rich heterogeneity even in the presence of multiple instruments. The new framework can be viewed as having multiple different choice models for the same observed treatment variable, all of which must be consistent with the data and with each other. Using this framework, we develop a methodology for partial identification of clearly stated, policy-relevant target parameters while allowing for a wide variety of nonparametric shape restrictions and parametric functional form assumptions. We show how the methodology can be used to combine multiple instruments together to yield more informative empirical conclusions than one would obtain by using each instrument separately. The methodology provides a blueprint for extracting and aggregating information about treatment effects from multiple controlled or natural experiments while still allowing for rich heterogeneity in both treatment effects and choice behavior.
27546.zh_abstract: 边际处理效应方法广泛用于工具变量的因果推断和政策评估。然而，它们根本上依赖于处理选择行为中众所周知的单调性（阈值交叉）条件。最近的研究表明，除非处理选择是有效同质的，否则该条件在存在多个工具变量时无法成立。基于这些发现，我们在一个较弱的、部分单调性条件下开发了一个新的边际处理效应框架。部分单调性条件由标准选择理论隐含，并允许在存在多个工具变量的情况下存在丰富的异质性。新框架可以视为对同一观测处理变量有多个不同的选择模型，所有这些模型必须与数据一致且彼此一致。利用这一框架，我们开发了一种方法，用于在允许各种非参数形状约束和参数函数形式假设的同时，对明确陈述的、政策相关的目标参数进行部分识别。我们展示了如何使用该方法将多个工具变量结合起来，以产生比单独使用每个工具变量更具信息量的实证结论。该方法提供了一个蓝图，用于从多个受控或自然实验中提取和汇总关于处理效应的信息，同时仍允许处理效应和选择行为中存在丰富的异质性。
27546.meta: Programs：LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C01, C1, C26, C31

27545.title: Heterogeneous Effects of State Enterprise Zone Programs in the Shorter Run and Longer Run
27545.zh_title: 州企业区项目在短期和长期的异质性效应
27545.abstract: We take up two questions that have not been explored in research on enterprise zones. First, does a considerably longer-run perspective on the effects of state enterprise zones lead to different answers? And second, are there heterogeneous effects of enterprise zones that depend on the set of incentives these programs offer, which can vary widely? Our results indicate that whether we look at state enterprise zone programs through a longer-term lens, or through the lens of program heterogeneity, we generally do not find any consistent indication of beneficial effects of state enterprise zone programs, and if anything the longer-run effects are negative. The lack of positive effects is consistent with most of the prior evidence that focuses on effects that are short-term and homogeneous.
27545.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了企业区研究中尚未探索的两个问题。第一，对州企业区效应的更长期视角是否会得出不同的结论？第二，企业区是否存在取决于这些项目提供的激励措施组合（可能差异很大）的异质性效应？我们的结果表明，无论我们是通过长期视角还是项目异质性视角来审视州企业区项目，我们通常都没有发现任何一致的迹象表明州企业区项目具有有益效应，甚至长期效应是负面的。缺乏积极效应与大多数先前关注短期和同质性效应的证据一致。

27544.title: The Opioid Epidemic Was Not Caused by Economic Distress But by Factors that Could be More Rapidly Addressed
27544.zh_title: 阿片类药物流行并非由经济困境引起，而是由可以更快解决的因素导致
27544.abstract: Without the opioid epidemic, American life expectancy would not have declined prior to 2020. In turn, the epidemic was sparked by the development and marketing of a new generation of prescription opioids and provider behavior is still helping to drive it. There is little relationship between the opioid crisis and contemporaneous measures of labor market opportunity. Cohorts and areas that experienced poor labor market conditions do show lagged increases in opioid mortality, but the effect is modest relative to the scale of the epidemic. Instead, we argue that there are specific policies and features of the U.S. health care market that led to the current crisis. It will not be possible to quickly reverse depressed economic conditions, but it is possible to implement policies that would reduce the number of new opioid addicts and save the lives of many of those who are already addicted.
27544.zh_abstract: 如果没有阿片类药物流行，美国人的预期寿命在2020年之前就不会下降。反过来，这场流行是由新一代处方阿片类药物的开发和营销引发的，而提供者的行为仍在推动其发展。阿片类药物危机与同期劳动力市场机会指标之间几乎没有关系。经历较差劳动力市场条件的群体和地区确实显示出阿片类药物死亡率的滞后增长，但相对于流行的规模，这种效应是适度的。相反，我们认为，是美国医疗保健市场的特定政策和特征导致了当前的危机。不可能迅速扭转低迷的经济状况，但有可能实施政策，以减少新的阿片类药物成瘾者数量，并挽救许多已经成瘾者的生命。

27543.title: Teacher-to-Classroom Assignment and Student Achievement
27543.zh_title: 教师与班级的分配及学生学业成就
27543.authors: Bryan S. Graham, Geert Ridder, Petra M. Thiemann, Gema Zamarro
27543.abstract: We study the effects of counterfactual teacher-to-classroom assignments on average student achievement in elementary and middle schools in the US. We use the Measures of Effective Teaching (MET) experiment to semiparametrically identify the average reallocation effects (AREs) of such assignments. Our findings suggest that changes in within-district teacher assignments could have appreciable effects on student achievement. Unlike policies which require hiring additional teachers (e.g., class-size reduction measures), or those aimed at changing the stock of teachers (e.g., VAM-guided teacher tenure policies), alternative teacher-to-classroom assignments are resource neutral; they raise student achievement through a more efficient deployment of existing teachers.
27543.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国中小学中反事实的教师与班级分配对平均学生学业成就的影响。我们利用有效教学测量（MET）实验，半参数地识别了此类分配的平均重新分配效应（AREs）。我们的研究结果表明，学区内的教师分配变化可能对学生学业成就产生显著影响。与需要额外招聘教师的政策（如缩小班级规模措施）或旨在改变教师存量的政策（如基于增值模型的教师任期政策）不同，替代性的教师与班级分配是资源中性的；它们通过更有效地部署现有教师来提高学生学业成就。
27543.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C14, C36, I21, I24

27542.title: How Hurricanes Sweep Up Housing Markets: Evidence from Florida
27542.zh_title: 飓风如何席卷住房市场：来自佛罗里达州的证据
27542.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Yanjun Liao, Yann Panassie
27542.abstract: This paper examines the impacts of hurricanes on the housing market and the associated implications for local population turnover. We first characterize the post-hurricane equilibrium dynamics in local housing markets using microdata from Florida during 2000-2016. Our results show that hurricanes cause an increase in equilibrium prices and a concurrent decrease in transactions in affected areas, both lasting up to three years. Together, these dynamics imply a negative transitory shock to the housing supply as a consequence of the hurricane. Furthermore, we match buyer characteristics from mortgage applications to provide the first buyer-level evidence on population turnover. We find that incoming homeowners in this period have higher incomes, leading to an overall shift in the local economic profile toward higher-income groups. Our findings suggest that market responses to destructive natural disasters can lead to uneven and lasting demographic changes in affected communities, even with a full recovery in physical capital.
27542.zh_abstract: 本文研究了飓风对住房市场的影响及其对当地人口流动的相关影响。我们首先利用2000-2016年佛罗里达州的微观数据，刻画了飓风后当地住房市场的均衡动态。我们的结果表明，飓风导致受影响地区的均衡价格上升，同时交易量下降，两者均持续长达三年。这些动态共同表明，飓风对住房供应造成了负面的暂时性冲击。此外，我们通过匹配抵押贷款申请中的购房者特征，首次提供了关于人口流动的购房者层面证据。我们发现，这一时期迁入的房主收入更高，导致当地经济结构整体向高收入群体转变。我们的研究结果表明，市场对破坏性自然灾害的反应可能导致受影响社区出现不均衡且持久的人口结构变化，即使物质资本完全恢复。

27541.title: Financing Outdoor Recreation
27541.authors: H. Spencer Banzhaf, V. Kerry Smith
27541.abstract: The National Park Service and other agencies have argued that our recreation lands face a crisis of deferred maintenance. This paper evaluates two proposals for funding public lands, increasing gate fees and taxing recreational gear. It analyzes the joint welfare effects of such taxes and the services supported by the revenue. It shows that when the taxed goods and the public service are "weak complements," there is a simple sufficient statistic determining whether the joint effect increases welfare both for consumers and sellers: Namely, the demand for the taxed good increases. The paper illustrates these results with data for recreational services.
27541.zh_abstract: 国家公园管理局及其他机构认为，我们的休闲用地面临延期维护的危机。本文评估了两种公共土地融资方案：提高门票费和征收休闲装备税。它分析了此类税收与税收收入所支持的服务的联合福利效应。研究表明，当被征税商品与公共服务是“弱互补品”时，存在一个简单的充分统计量，用于判断联合效应是否同时提高消费者和卖家的福利：即被征税商品的需求增加。本文利用休闲服务数据说明了这些结果。

27540.title: Strategic Interactions in U.S. Monetary and Fiscal Policies
27540.zh_title: 美国货币与财政政策中的战略互动
27540.authors: Xiaoshan Chen, Eric M. Leeper, Campbell B. Leith
27540.abstract: We estimate a model in which fiscal and monetary policy behavior arise from the optimizing behavior of distinct policy authorities, with potentially different welfare functions. Optimal time-consistent policy behavior fits U.S. time series at least as well as rules-based behavior. American policies often do not conform to the conventional mix of conservative monetary policy and debt-stabilizing fiscal policy. Even after the Volcker disinflation, policies did not achieve that conventional mix, as fiscal policy did not act to stabilize debt until the mid 1990s. A credible conservative central bank that follows a time-consistent fiscal policy leader would come close to mimicking the cooperative Ramsey policy. Had that strategic policy mix been in place, American might have avoided the Great Inflation. Enhancing cooperation between policy makers without an ability to commit may be detrimental to welfare.
27540.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个模型，其中财政和货币政策行为源于不同政策当局的优化行为，且这些当局可能具有不同的福利函数。最优时间一致的政策行为与美国时间序列数据的拟合程度至少与基于规则的行为相当。美国的政策常常不符合传统的保守货币政策与债务稳定财政政策的组合。即使在沃尔克反通胀之后，政策也未实现这一传统组合，因为财政政策直到1990年代中期才开始稳定债务。一个遵循时间一致财政政策领导者的可信保守中央银行，将接近模仿合作的拉姆齐政策。如果当时采用了这种战略政策组合，美国或许可以避免大通胀。在没有承诺能力的情况下加强政策制定者之间的合作可能对福利有害。
27540.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：E31, E32, E52, E61, E62, E63

27539.title: The Impact of State Tobacco Control Spending on High School Student Vaping
27539.zh_title: 州烟草控制支出对高中生电子烟使用的影响
27539.authors: John A. Tauras, Megan C. Diaz, Barbara Schillo, Donna Vallone
27539.abstract: The rapid rise in e-cigarette use rates among high school students in the United States is a significant source of public policy concern for many states. This paper is the first study to examine the impact of state tobacco control spending on the demand for vaping products by high school students. The findings from this study provide strong evidence that funding for state tobacco control programs is associated with reduced vaping among youth and young adults in the US. These findings could help to inform decision making about how states should allocate scarce public resources.
27539.zh_abstract: 美国高中生电子烟使用率的迅速上升是许多州公共政策关注的重要来源。本文是首项研究州烟草控制支出对高中生电子烟产品需求影响的研究。本研究的结果提供了强有力的证据，表明州烟草控制项目的资金与美国青少年和年轻人电子烟使用减少相关。这些发现有助于为各州如何分配稀缺公共资源的决策提供信息。

27538.title: How Do Restrictions on High-Skilled Immigration Affect Offshoring? Evidence from the H-1B Program
27538.zh_title: 高技能移民限制如何影响离岸外包？来自H-1B项目的证据
27538.abstract: Highly-skilled workers are not only a crucial and relatively scarce inputs into firms’ productive and innovative processes, but are also a critical resource determining competitive advantage. An increasingly high proportion of these workers in the US were born abroad and permitted to work on skilled worker visas. How do multinational firms respond when artificial constraints, namely policies restricting skilled immigration, are placed on their ability to hire scarce human capital? This paper combines visa microdata and comprehensive data on US multinational firm activity to demonstrate that firms respond to restrictions on H-1B immigration by increasing foreign affiliate employment at the intensive and extensive margins, particularly in China, India, and Canada. The most impacted jobs were R&D-intensive ones, but there is some evidence that non-R&D employment was also affected. The paper highlights a means by which firms can circumvent constraining policies and mitigate country-level risk, but it also suggests that, for the average MNC, this means is imperfect; for every visa rejection, they hire 0.4 employees abroad. The most globalized MNCs are the most likely to respond to these restrictions by offshoring, highlighting that firm capabilities—in the form of prior internationalization—shape the decision and ability to offshore in response to skilled immigration restrictions; indeed, these firms hire 0.9 employees abroad for every visa rejection. More broadly, the paper provides evidence of a push factor for internationalizing knowledge activity: artificial constraints on resources result in firms circumventing restrictive policies in ways that may not be anticipated by policy makers.
27538.zh_abstract: 高技能工人不仅是企业生产和创新过程中关键且相对稀缺的投入，也是决定竞争优势的关键资源。在美国，这些工人中在国外出生并持技能工人签证工作的比例越来越高。当人为限制（即限制技能移民的政策）被施加于企业雇佣稀缺人力资本的能力时，跨国公司会如何应对？本文结合签证微观数据和美国跨国公司活动的综合数据，表明企业通过增加外国附属公司的雇佣（在集约边际和广延边际上）来应对H-1B移民限制，尤其是在中国、印度和加拿大。受影响最大的岗位是研发密集型岗位，但也有证据表明非研发就业也受到了影响。本文强调了一种企业规避限制性政策和减轻国家层面风险的方式，但也表明，对于普通跨国公司而言，这种方式并不完美；每拒绝一份签证，他们就在国外雇佣0.4名员工。最全球化的跨国公司最有可能通过离岸外包来应对这些限制，这突显了企业能力——以先前国际化形式——塑造了应对技能移民限制而进行离岸外包的决策和能力；事实上，这些公司每拒绝一份签证，就在国外雇佣0.9名员工。更广泛地说，本文提供了知识活动国际化的推动因素证据：对资源的人为限制导致企业以政策制定者可能未预料到的方式规避限制性政策。
27538.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F16, F22, F23, J61, O3

27537.title: Kicking the Can Down the Road: Government Interventions in the European Banking Sector
27537.zh_title: 踢皮球：欧洲银行业部门的政府干预
27537.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Lea Borchert, Maximilian Jager, Sascha Steffen
27537.abstract: We analyze the determinants and the long-run consequences of government interventions in the eurozone banking sector during the 2008/09 financial crisis. Using a novel and comprehensive dataset, we document that fiscally constrained governments “kicked the can down the road” by providing banks with guarantees instead of full-fledged recapitalizations. We adopt an econometric approach that addresses the endogeneity associated with governmental bailout decisions in identifying their consequences. We find that forbearance caused undercapitalized banks to shift their assets from loans to risky sovereign debt and engage in zombie lending, resulting in weaker credit supply, elevated risk in the banking sector, and, eventually, greater reliance on liquidity support from the European Central Bank.
27537.zh_abstract: 我们分析了2008/09年金融危机期间欧元区银行业部门政府干预的决定因素和长期后果。利用一个新颖且全面的数据集，我们记录了财政受限的政府通过向银行提供担保而非全面资本重组来“踢皮球”。我们采用了一种计量经济学方法，在识别政府救助决策的后果时处理了相关的内生性问题。我们发现，宽容政策导致资本不足的银行将其资产从贷款转向风险主权债务，并从事僵尸贷款，从而导致信贷供给减弱、银行业部门风险上升，并最终更加依赖欧洲中央银行的流动性支持。
27537.meta: Programs：CF, ME, POL；JEL：E44, G21, G28, G32, G34

27536.title: Dynamic Oligopoly and Price Stickiness
27536.zh_title: 动态寡头垄断与价格粘性
27536.abstract: How does market concentration affect the potency of monetary policy? The ubiquitous monopolistic-competition framework is silent on this issue. To tackle this question we build a model with heterogeneous oligopolistic sectors. In each sector, a finite number of firms play a Bertrand dynamic game with staggered price rigidity. Following an extensive Industrial Organization literature, we focus on Markov equilibria within each sector. Aggregating up, we study monetary shocks and provide a closed-form formula for the response of aggregate output, highlighting three measurable sufficient statistics: demand elasticities, market concentration, and markups. We calibrate our model to the empirical evidence on pass-through, and find that higher market concentration significantly amplifies the real effects of monetary policy. To separate the strategic effects of oligopoly from the effects this has on residual demand, we compare our model to one with monopolistic firms after modifying consumer preferences to ensure firms face comparable residual demands. Finally, the Phillips curve for our model displays inflation persistence and endogenous cost-push shocks.
27536.zh_abstract: 市场集中度如何影响货币政策的效力？普遍存在的垄断竞争框架对此问题保持沉默。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一个包含异质性寡头垄断部门的模型。在每个部门中，有限数量的企业在交错价格刚性下进行伯特兰动态博弈。遵循产业组织领域的广泛文献，我们关注每个部门内的马尔可夫均衡。通过加总，我们研究货币冲击，并给出了总产出响应的闭式公式，突出了三个可测的充分统计量：需求弹性、市场集中度和加成率。我们将模型校准到关于传导的经验证据，发现更高的市场集中度显著放大了货币政策的实际效应。为了分离寡头垄断的战略效应及其对剩余需求的影响，我们将我们的模型与一个垄断企业模型进行比较，后者通过修改消费者偏好确保企业面临可比的剩余需求。最后，我们模型的菲利普斯曲线显示出通胀持续性和内生成本推动冲击。

27535.title: Non est Disputandum de Generalizability? A Glimpse into The External Validity Trial
27535.zh_title: 关于可推广性是否存在争议？外部有效性试验一瞥
27535.abstract: While empirical economics has made important strides over the past half century, there is a recent attack that threatens the foundations of the empirical approach in economics: external validity. Certain dogmatic arguments are not new, yet in some circles the generalizability question is beyond dispute, rendering empirical work as a passive enterprise based on frivolity. Such arguments serve to caution even the staunchest empirical advocates from even starting an empirical inquiry in a novel setting. In its simplest form, questions of external validity revolve around whether the results of the received study can be generalized to different people, situations, stimuli, and time periods. This study clarifies and places the external validity crisis into perspective by taking a unique glimpse into the grandest of trials: The External Validity Trial. A key outcome of the proceedings is an Author Onus Probandi, which outlines four key areas that every study should report to address external validity. Such an evaluative approach properly rewards empirical advances and justly recognizes inherent empirical limitations.
27535.zh_abstract: 尽管实证经济学在过去半个世纪取得了重要进展，但近期出现了一种威胁经济学实证方法基础的攻击：外部有效性。某些教条式论点并非新鲜事物，但在某些圈子里，可推广性问题已无可争议，使得实证工作沦为基于轻浮的被动事业。这类论点甚至告诫最坚定的实证倡导者，不要在新环境中开始实证探究。简单来说，外部有效性问题围绕已接受研究的结果能否推广到不同人群、情境、刺激和时间段。本研究通过独特视角审视最宏大的试验——外部有效性试验，澄清并正确看待外部有效性危机。程序的一个关键结果是“作者举证责任”，它概述了每项研究应报告的四个关键领域，以解决外部有效性。这种评估方法恰当地奖励实证进展，并公正地承认固有的实证局限性。
27535.meta: Programs：EEE, LE, PE；JEL：C01, C9, C91, C93, D9

27534.title: Relabeling, Retirement and Regret
27534.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Ohto Kanninen, Terhi Ravaska
27534.abstract: Focal retirement ages are a central feature of Social Security programs around the world, and provide a potentially powerful tool for policy makers who are interested in reforming retirement systems to address the growing funding shortfalls. But these tools often come hand in hand with significant changes in the financial structure of Social Security that can have independent, and potentially deleterious, impacts on retirees. In this paper, we use a major reformulation of the retirement system in Finland, featuring a relabeling of retirement ages with modest and continuous changes in financial incentives allows us to separately estimate the impact of relabeling from financial incentives in driving retirement decisions. We find that relabeling is particularly powerful as a determinant of date of retirement. Both graphical evidence and estimated hazard models reveal an enormous change in retirement when individuals face a newly defined “normal retirement” age. We also present a new approach to assessing the welfare implications of induced earlier retirement: looking at the impact on return to work. We show that the marginal workers induced to retire by relabeling are much more likely to return to work over the next three years than is the typical worker. This suggests that there is a marginal increase in regret among those who respond to this change in retirement ages.
27534.zh_abstract: 焦点退休年龄是全球社会保障项目的核心特征，为有意改革退休制度以应对日益增长的资金缺口的政策制定者提供了潜在有力工具。但这些工具往往伴随着社会保障财务结构的重大变化，这些变化可能对退休人员产生独立且潜在有害的影响。本文利用芬兰退休制度的重大改革，该改革以退休年龄的重新标签为特征，并伴有适度且连续的财务激励变化，使我们能够将重新标签的影响与财务激励对退休决策的影响分开估计。我们发现，重新标签作为退休日期的决定因素特别强大。图形证据和估计的风险模型都显示，当个人面临新定义的“正常退休”年龄时，退休行为发生了巨大变化。我们还提出了一种评估诱导提前退休福利影响的新方法：考察对重返工作的影响。我们表明，因重新标签而诱导退休的边际工人，在接下来三年内重返工作的可能性远高于典型工人。这表明，那些响应退休年龄变化的人中，后悔情绪有边际增加。

27533.title: Concentration Screens for Horizontal Mergers
27533.zh_title: 横向合并的集中度筛选
27533.abstract: Concentration-based screens for horizontal mergers, such as those employed in the US DOJ and FTC Horizontal Merger Guidelines, play a central role in merger analysis. However, the basis for these screens, in both form and level, remains unclear. We show that there is both a theoretical and an empirical basis for focusing solely on the change in the Herfindahl index, and ignoring its level, in screening mergers for whether their unilateral effects will harm consumers. We also argue, again both theoretically and empirically, that the levels at which the presumptions currently are set may allow mergers to proceed that cause consumer harm.
27533.zh_abstract: 基于集中度的横向合并筛选，例如美国司法部和联邦贸易委员会《横向合并指南》中采用的筛选，在合并分析中发挥着核心作用。然而，这些筛选在形式和水平上的依据仍不明确。我们表明，在筛选合并的单边效应是否会损害消费者时，仅关注赫芬达尔指数的变化而忽略其水平，既有理论基础也有实证基础。我们还从理论和实证两方面论证，当前设定推定水平可能允许那些会造成消费者损害的合并继续进行。

27532.title: Adaptive Control of COVID-19 Outbreaks in India: Local, Gradual, and Trigger-based Exit Paths from Lockdown
27532.zh_title: 印度COVID-19疫情的适应性控制：从封锁中逐步、局部且基于触发条件的退出路径
27532.authors: Anup Malani, Satej Soman, Sam Asher, Paul Novosad, Clement Imbert, Vaidehi Tandel, Anish Agarwal, Abdullah Alomar, Arnab Sarker, Devavrat Shah, Dennis Shen, Jonathan Gruber, Stuti Sachdeva, David Kaiser, Luis M.A. Bettencourt
27532.abstract: Managing the outbreak of COVID-19 in India constitutes an unprecedented health emergency in one of the largest and most diverse nations in the world. On May 4, 2020, India started the process of releasing its population from a national lockdown during which extreme social distancing was implemented. We describe and simulate an adaptive control approach to exit this situation, while maintaining the epidemic under control. Adaptive control is a flexible counter-cyclical policy approach, whereby different areas release from lockdown in potentially different gradual ways, dependent on the local progression of the dis- ease. Because of these features, adaptive control requires the ability to decrease or increase social distancing in response to observed and projected dynamics of the disease outbreak. We show via simulation of a stochastic Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) model and of a synthetic intervention (SI) model that adaptive control performs at least as well as immediate and full release from lockdown starting May 4 and as full release from lockdown after a month (i.e., after May 31). The key insight is that adaptive response provides the option to increase or decrease socioeconomic activity depending on how it affects disease progression and this freedom allows it to do at least as well as most other policy alternatives. We also discuss the central challenge to any nuanced release policy, including adaptive control, specifically learning how specific policies translate into changes in contact rates and thus COVID-19's reproductive rate in real time.
27532.zh_abstract: 管理印度COVID-19疫情构成了这个全球最大、最多元化国家之一前所未有的卫生紧急事件。2020年5月4日，印度开始解除全国封锁，此前实施了极端社交距离措施。我们描述并模拟了一种适应性控制方法来退出这种状态，同时保持疫情受控。适应性控制是一种灵活的反周期政策方法，不同地区根据当地疾病进展，以可能不同的渐进方式解除封锁。由于这些特点，适应性控制需要根据观察和预测的疾病爆发动态，具备减少或增加社交距离的能力。我们通过随机易感-感染-恢复模型和合成干预模型的模拟表明，适应性控制的表现至少与从5月4日开始立即全面解除封锁以及一个月后（即5月31日后）全面解除封锁一样好。关键见解是，适应性响应提供了根据疾病进展对经济活动的影响来增加或减少社会经济活动的选项，这种自由使其表现至少与大多数其他政策替代方案相当。我们还讨论了任何精细解除封锁政策（包括适应性控制）面临的核心挑战，特别是学习特定政策如何实时转化为接触率变化，从而影响COVID-19的再生率。

27597.title: Assessing the Age Specificity of Infection Fatality Rates for COVID-19: Systematic Review, Meta-analysis, & Public Policy Implications
27597.zh_title: 评估COVID-19感染致死率的年龄特异性：系统综述、荟萃分析与公共政策启示
27597.authors: Andrew T. Levin, William P. Hanage, Nana Owusu-Boaitey, Kensington B. Cochran, Seamus P. Walsh, Gideon Meyerowitz-Katz
27597.abstract: To assess age-specific infection fatality rates (IFRs) for COVID-19, we have conducted a systematic review of seroprevalence studies as well as countries with comprehensive tracing programs. Age-specific IFRs were computed using the prevalence data in conjunction with reported fatalities four weeks after the midpoint date of each study, reflecting typical lags in fatalities and reporting. Using metaregression procedures, we find a highly significant log-linear relationship between age and IFR for COVID-19. The estimated age-specific IFRs are very low for children and younger adults but increase progressively to 0.4% at age 55, 1.3% at age 65, 4.2% at age 75, and 14% at age 85. About 90% of the geographical variation in population IFR is explained by differences in age composition of the population and age-specific prevalence. These results indicate that COVID-19 is hazardous not only for the elderly but also for middle-aged adults. Moreover, the population IFR for COVID-19 should not be viewed as a fixed parameter but as intrinsically linked to the age-specific pattern of infections. Consequently, public health measures to protect vulnerable age groups could substantially decrease total deaths.
27597.zh_abstract: 为评估COVID-19的年龄特异性感染致死率，我们对血清阳性率研究以及拥有全面追踪计划的国家进行了系统综述。利用患病率数据，并结合每项研究中点日期四周后报告的死亡人数（考虑到死亡和报告中的典型滞后），计算了年龄特异性感染致死率。使用荟萃回归程序，我们发现年龄与COVID-19感染致死率之间存在高度显著的对数线性关系。估计的年龄特异性感染致死率对儿童和年轻成年人非常低，但逐渐增加：55岁时为0.4%，65岁时为1.3%，75岁时为4.2%，85岁时为14%。约90%的人口感染致死率地理差异可由人口年龄构成和年龄特异性患病率的差异解释。这些结果表明，COVID-19不仅对老年人，而且对中年成年人也构成危险。此外，COVID-19的人口感染致死率不应被视为一个固定参数，而是与感染的年龄特异性模式内在相关。因此，保护脆弱年龄组的公共卫生措施可以大幅减少总死亡人数。

27596.title: Quick Response Economic Stimulus: The Effect of Small-Value Digital Coupons on Spending
27596.zh_title: 快速响应经济刺激：小额数字优惠券对消费的影响
27596.authors: Jianwei Xing, Eric Zou, Zhentao Yin, Yong Wang, Zhenhua Li
27596.abstract: We study a new consumption stimulus model that leverages mobile payment platforms to dispense massive amounts of small-value, use-it-this-week-or-lose-it digital coupons. We evaluate the effects of one such program in a large Chinese city using novel data of mobile platform transactions of 1 million program participants. Exploiting participants’ rush to the first-come, first-served digital portal, we compare spending among those who won coupons to those who lost because of minor differences in the timing of their arrival at the portal. We find that coupons generate an immediate increase in weekly consumption among winners by $\$3$ additional out-of-pocket spending for every $\$1$ in government subsidy. Coupon-winning consumers practice intertemporal substitution by moving up purchases that would have been made months in the future. Analysis of business customer flows suggests that coupons distort consumption toward more expensive options, leading the program to disproportionately favor big firms that sell pricier goods and services. Relaxing coupons’ minimum spending requirements would alleviate such distributional concern without sacrificing consumer welfare. We conclude that the coupon model can be a useful addition to policy makers’ stimulus toolbox.
27596.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种新的消费刺激模式，该模式利用移动支付平台发放大量小额、本周有效、过期作废的数字优惠券。我们利用一个中国大城市此类项目的100万参与者的移动平台交易新数据，评估了其效果。利用参与者争先恐后涌向先到先得的数字门户这一情况，我们比较了那些因到达门户时间细微差异而赢得优惠券和失去优惠券的人之间的消费。我们发现，优惠券使赢家每周消费立即增加，每1元政府补贴带来3元额外自付支出。赢得优惠券的消费者通过将原本数月后才会进行的购买提前，实现了跨期替代。对商业客户流的分析表明，优惠券将消费扭曲至更昂贵的选择，导致该项目不成比例地有利于销售高价商品和服务的大公司。放宽优惠券的最低消费要求可以缓解这种分配担忧，同时不牺牲消费者福利。我们得出结论，优惠券模式可以成为政策制定者刺激工具箱中的有用补充。

27595.title: Bargaining over Taxes and Entitlements
27595.authors: Marina Azzimonti, Gabriel P. Mihalache, Laura Karpuska
27595.abstract: We analyze the welfare implications of introducing budget rules, composed by a tax code and an entitlement program, in a dynamic infinite horizon political-economy model featuring disagreement over the distribution of resources. Poor agents want expansive entitlement programs, whereas rich agents prefer a small government that imposes low taxes. Under budget rules, changes in the tax code and the generosity of entitlement programs require bipartisan support. We model these rules following the literature on legislative bargaining with endogenous status quo, and find that entitlement programs induce under-provision of public goods but also a smoother path for private consumption. Whether budget rules are welfare-improving depends critically on political turnover. When proposers alternate frequently, such rules benefit society because they reduce the volatility of private consumption. Outcomes under rules, however, can be worse than under discretion if the political power of a proposer is persistent enough. Even though the political equilibrium may be more efficient in such case, it can also be significantly less equitable, exacerbating the initial degree of income inequality. We also consider an institutional reform, where parties are allowed to vote on both, the introduction and generosity of the entitlement program and the tax code. Because such a reform must be Pareto improving (by design), policymakers may prefer to stay under discretion.
27595.zh_abstract: 我们在一个动态无限期界政治经济学模型中分析了引入预算规则（由税法和福利计划组成）的福利含义，该模型以资源分配分歧为特征。贫困代理人希望扩大福利计划，而富裕代理人则偏好征收低税的小政府。在预算规则下，税法的变更和福利计划的慷慨程度需要两党支持。我们遵循关于内生现状的立法谈判文献来建模这些规则，发现福利计划导致公共物品供给不足，但也使私人消费路径更平滑。预算规则是否能改善福利关键取决于政治更替。当提议者频繁轮换时，此类规则对社会有利，因为它们减少了私人消费的波动性。然而，如果提议者的政治权力足够持久，规则下的结果可能比自由裁量权下的结果更差。尽管在这种情况下政治均衡可能更有效率，但也可能显著更不公平，加剧了初始的收入不平等程度。我们还考虑了一项制度改革，允许各方对福利计划的引入和慷慨程度以及税法进行投票。由于这种改革（按设计）必须是帕累托改进的，政策制定者可能更倾向于保持自由裁量权。
27595.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, POL；JEL：C7, D6, E6, E62, H53

27594.title: RCTs to Scale: Comprehensive Evidence from Two Nudge Units
27594.zh_title: 大规模随机对照试验：来自两个助推单位的全面证据
27594.abstract: Nudge interventions have quickly expanded from academic studies to larger implementation in so-called Nudge Units in governments. This provides an opportunity to compare interventions in research studies, versus at scale. We assemble a unique data set of 126 RCTs covering over 23 million individuals, including all trials run by two of the largest Nudge Units in the United States. We compare these trials to a sample of nudge trials published in academic journals from two recent meta-analyses. In papers published in academic journals, the average impact of a nudge is very large – an 8.7 percentage point take-up effect, a 33.5% increase over the average control. In the Nudge Unit trials, the average impact is still sizable and highly statistically significant, but smaller at 1.4 percentage points, an 8.1% increase. We consider five potential channels for this gap: statistical power, selective publication, academic involvement, differences in trial features and in nudge features. Publication bias in the academic journals, exacerbated by low statistical power, can account for the full difference in effect sizes. Academic involvement does not account for the difference. Different features of the nudges, such as in-person versus letter-based communication, likely reflecting institutional constraints, can partially explain the different effect sizes. We conjecture that larger sample sizes and institutional constraints, which play an important role in our setting, are relevant in other at-scale implementations. Finally, we compare these results to the predictions of academics and practitioners. Most forecasters overestimate the impact for the Nudge Unit interventions, though nudge practitioners are almost perfectly calibrated.
27594.zh_abstract: 助推干预已迅速从学术研究扩展到政府所谓的“助推单位”中的更大规模实施。这提供了一个比较研究性干预与大规模实施效果的机会。我们整理了一个独特的126项随机对照试验数据集，覆盖超过2300万人，包括美国两个最大助推单位进行的所有试验。我们将这些试验与来自两项近期荟萃分析的学术期刊发表的助推试验样本进行比较。在学术期刊发表的论文中，助推的平均效果非常大——8.7个百分点的采纳效应，比对照组平均增加33.5%。在助推单位试验中，平均效果仍然可观且高度统计显著，但较小，为1.4个百分点，增加8.1%。我们考虑了造成这一差距的五个潜在渠道：统计功效、选择性发表、学术参与、试验特征差异和助推特征差异。学术期刊中的发表偏倚，加上低统计功效，可以完全解释效应量的差异。学术参与不能解释这一差异。助推的不同特征，例如面对面与基于信件的沟通，可能反映了制度约束，可以部分解释不同的效应量。我们推测，在我们的环境中发挥重要作用的更大样本量和制度约束，在其他大规模实施中也具有相关性。最后，我们将这些结果与学者和实践者的预测进行比较。大多数预测者高估了助推单位干预的影响，尽管助推实践者的预测几乎完美校准。
27594.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D9, H53, I38

27593.title: Does Joining the S&P 500 Index Hurt Firms?
27593.zh_title: 加入标普500指数会损害公司吗？
27593.authors: Benjamin Bennett, René M. Stulz, Zexi Wang
27593.abstract: We investigate the impact on firms of joining the S&P 500 index from 1997 to 2017. We find that the positive announcement effect on the stock price of index inclusion has disappeared and the long-run impact of index inclusion has become negative. Inclusion worsens stock price informativeness and some aspects of governance. Compensation, investment, and financial policies change with index inclusion. For instance, payout policies of firms joining the index become more similar to the policies of their index peers. ROA falls following inclusion. There is no evidence of an impact of inclusion on competition.
27593.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1997年至2017年加入标普500指数对公司的影响。我们发现，指数纳入对股价的正面公告效应已经消失，而指数纳入的长期影响已变为负面。纳入降低了股价信息含量和治理的某些方面。薪酬、投资和财务政策随指数纳入而改变。例如，加入指数公司的派息政策变得与其指数同行更加相似。纳入后资产回报率下降。没有证据表明纳入对竞争有影响。
27593.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G11, G14, G23, G31, G32, G35

27592.title: Racial and Ethnic Disparities in COVID-19: Evidence from Six Large Cities
27592.zh_title: COVID-19中的种族与民族差异：来自六大城市的证据
27592.authors: Joseph A. Benitez, Charles J. Courtemanche, Aaron Yelowitz
27592.abstract: As of June 2020, the coronavirus pandemic has led to more than 2.3 million confirmed infections and 121 thousand fatalities in the United States, with starkly different incidence by race and ethnicity. Our study examines racial and ethnic disparities in confirmed COVID-19 cases across six diverse cities – Atlanta, Baltimore, Chicago, New York City, San Diego, and St. Louis – at the ZIP code level (covering 436 “neighborhoods” with a population of 17.7 million). Our analysis links these outcomes to six separate data sources to control for demographics; housing; socioeconomic status; occupation; transportation modes; health care access; long-run opportunity, as measured by income mobility and incarceration rates; human mobility; and underlying population health. We find that the proportions of black and Hispanic residents in a ZIP code are both positively and statistically significantly associated with COVID-19 cases per capita. The magnitudes are sizeable for both black and Hispanic, but even larger for Hispanic. Although some of these disparities can be explained by differences in long-run opportunity, human mobility, and demographics, most of the disparities remain unexplained even after including an extensive list of covariates related to possible mechanisms. For two cities – Chicago and New York – we also examine COVID-19 fatalities, finding that differences in confirmed COVID-19 cases explain the majority of the observed disparities in fatalities. In other words, the higher death toll of COVID-19 in predominantly black and Hispanic communities mostly reflects higher case rates, rather than higher fatality rates for confirmed cases.
27592.zh_abstract: 截至2020年6月，新冠疫情已导致美国超过230万例确诊病例和12.1万例死亡，且不同种族和民族的发病率存在显著差异。本研究以邮政编码区为单位（覆盖436个“社区”，总人口1770万），考察了亚特兰大、巴尔的摩、芝加哥、纽约市、圣迭戈和圣路易斯这六个多元化城市中COVID-19确诊病例的种族与民族差异。我们的分析将这些结果与六个独立数据源相关联，以控制人口统计特征、住房状况、社会经济地位、职业、交通方式、医疗可及性、长期机会（以收入流动性和监禁率衡量）、人口流动性以及基础人口健康等因素。研究发现，邮政编码区中黑人和西班牙裔居民的比例均与人均COVID-19确诊病例数呈正向且统计上显著的相关性。黑人和西班牙裔群体的影响规模都相当大，但西班牙裔群体更大。尽管这些差异中的一部分可以通过长期机会、人口流动性和人口统计特征的差异来解释，但在纳入与可能机制相关的广泛协变量后，大部分差异仍然无法解释。对于芝加哥和纽约这两个城市，我们还考察了COVID-19死亡病例，发现确诊病例的差异解释了观察到的死亡差异的大部分。换言之，在黑人及西班牙裔占主导的社区中，COVID-19更高的死亡人数主要反映了更高的病例率，而非确诊病例更高的病死率。

27591.title: The Leveraging of Silicon Valley
27591.authors: Jesse Davis, Adair Morse, Xinxin Wang
27591.abstract: Early-stage firms utilize venture debt in one-third of financing rounds despite their general lack of cash flow and collateral. In our model, we show how venture debt aligns incentives within a firm. We derive a novel theoretical channel in which runway extension through debt increases firm value while potentially lowering closure. Consistent with the model's mechanism, we find that dilution predicts venture debt issuance. Empirically, treatment with venture debt lowers closure hazard by 1.6-4.4% and increases successful exits by 4.3-5.3%. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest $\$41$B, or 9.4% of invested capital, remains productive due to venture debt.
27591.zh_abstract: 早期阶段的公司在三分之一的融资轮次中会使用风险债务，尽管它们普遍缺乏现金流和抵押品。在我们的模型中，我们展示了风险债务如何协调公司内部的激励。我们推导出一个新颖的理论渠道，即通过债务延长跑道可以增加公司价值，同时可能降低倒闭概率。与该模型的机制一致，我们发现稀释效应可以预测风险债务的发行。实证上，接受风险债务处理使倒闭风险降低1.6%至4.4%，并使成功退出的概率增加4.3%至5.3%。粗略估算表明，由于风险债务的存在，410亿美元（即投资资本的9.4%）仍保持生产力。

27590.title: Learning Epidemiology by Doing: The Empirical Implications of a Spatial-SIR Model with Behavioral Responses
27590.zh_title: 在实践中学习流行病学：一个包含行为反应的空间SIR模型的经验含义
27590.abstract: We simulate a spatial behavioral model of the diffusion of an infection to understand the role of geographic characteristics: the number and distribution of outbreaks, population size, density, and agents’ movements. We show that several invariance properties of the SIR model concerning these variables do not hold when agents interact with neighbors in a (two dimensional) geographical space. Indeed, the spatial model’s local interactions generate matching frictions and local herd immunity effects, which play a fundamental role in the infection dynamics. We also show that geographical factors affect how behavioral responses affect the epidemics. We derive relevant implications for estimating the effects of the epidemics and policy interventions that use panel data from several geographical units.
27590.zh_abstract: 我们模拟了一个感染扩散的空间行为模型，以理解地理特征的作用：疫情爆发的数量和分布、人口规模、密度以及个体的移动。我们证明，当个体在（二维）地理空间中与邻居互动时，SIR模型关于这些变量的若干不变性不再成立。事实上，空间模型中的局部互动会产生匹配摩擦和局部群体免疫效应，这些在感染动态中起着根本性作用。我们还表明，地理因素会影响行为反应如何影响流行病。我们推导出对于使用多个地理单元的面板数据来估计流行病和政策干预效果的相关含义。

27589.title: Does the Commodity Super Cycle Matter?
27589.zh_title: 大宗商品超级周期重要吗？
27589.authors: Andrés Fernández, Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
27589.abstract: This paper investigates empirically the role of the commodity price super cycle in explaining real activity in developed and emerging economies. The commodity price super cycle is defined as a common permanent component in real commodity prices. Estimates using quarterly and annual data from 1960 to 2018 indicate that world shocks that affect commodity prices and the world interest rate explain more than half of the variance of output growth on average across countries. However, the majority of this contribution, more than two thirds, stems from stationary world shocks. These results suggest that world disturbances that are responsible for low frequency movements in commodity prices play an important but not dominant role in driving fluctuations in aggregate activity at the country level.
27589.zh_abstract: 本文实证研究了大宗商品价格超级周期在解释发达经济体和新兴经济体实际经济活动中的作用。大宗商品价格超级周期被定义为实际大宗商品价格中的一个共同永久成分。使用1960年至2018年的季度和年度数据进行的估计表明，影响大宗商品价格和世界利率的世界冲击平均解释了各国产出增长方差的一半以上。然而，这一贡献的大部分（超过三分之二）源于平稳的世界冲击。这些结果表明，导致大宗商品价格低频波动的世界扰动在驱动国家层面总体经济活动波动中扮演着重要但非主导的角色。

27588.title: The Role of Assets In Place: Loss of Market Exclusivity and Investment
27588.zh_title: 现有资产的作用：市场独占权丧失与投资
27588.authors: Matthew J. Higgins, Mathias J. Kronlund, Ji Min Park, Joshua Pollet
27588.abstract: We utilize a novel identification strategy to analyze the impact of assets in place on firms' decisions for future projects. We exploit the context in the pharmaceutical industry, where the loss of market exclusivity for a branded drug can be used to separate the impact of cash flows generated by a firm's current assets in place from the characteristics of its future investment opportunities. We first show that around the exclusivity losses in our sample of large drugs, the affected firms' profitability drop significantly. The timing of this profitability decrease was predetermined many years ago, and therefore, arguably independent of current investment opportunities. Nevertheless, we find that R&D spending drops by approximately 25% over two years following the loss of exclusivity. We also find that stock repurchases and cash balances decline significantly. Our findings do not support the predictions of traditional capital budgeting, but are more consistent with the pecking order theory. These results further point to a lack of long-term lifecycle management that could mitigate the effect of predictable negative shocks to cash flows.
27588.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种新颖的识别策略来分析现有资产对公司未来项目决策的影响。我们利用制药行业的背景，即品牌药市场独占权的丧失可以用来分离公司现有资产产生的现金流与其未来投资机会特征的影响。我们首先表明，在我们的大药企样本中，围绕独占权丧失事件，受影响公司的盈利能力显著下降。这种盈利能力下降的时间点是多年前预先确定的，因此可以说与当前的投资机会无关。尽管如此，我们发现，在独占权丧失后的两年内，研发支出下降了约25%。我们还发现，股票回购和现金余额显著下降。我们的发现不支持传统资本预算的预测，但更符合啄食顺序理论。这些结果进一步表明，缺乏能够减轻可预测的负面现金流冲击影响的长期生命周期管理。
27588.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D92, G31, G32, G35, L65, O30

27587.title: International Friends and Enemies
27587.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
27587.abstract: We examine whether as countries become more economically dependent on a trade partner, they realign politically towards that trade partner. We use network measures of economic exposure to foreign productivity growth derived from the class of trade models with a constant trade elasticity. We establish causality using two different sources of quasi-experimental variation: China’s emergence into the global economy and the reduction in the cost of air travel over time. In both cases, we find that increased economic friendship causes increased political friendship, and that our theory-based network measures dominate simpler measures of trading relationships between countries.
27587.zh_abstract: 我们考察了当国家在经济上越来越依赖某个贸易伙伴时，它们是否会在政治上向该贸易伙伴靠拢。我们使用源自具有恒定贸易弹性的贸易模型类别的网络指标来衡量对外国生产率增长的经济暴露度。我们利用两种不同的准实验变异来源来建立因果关系：中国融入全球经济以及航空旅行成本随时间下降。在这两种情况下，我们发现经济友谊的增加会导致政治友谊的增加，并且我们基于理论的网络指标优于国家间贸易关系的简单衡量指标。

27586.title: The Ends of 27 Big Depressions
27586.authors: Martin Ellison, Sang Seok Lee, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke
27586.abstract: How did countries recover from the Great Depression? In this paper we explore the argument that leaving the gold standard helped by boosting inflationary expectations and lowering real interest rates. We do so for a sample of 27 countries, using modern nowcasting methods and a new data set containing more than 230, 000 monthly and quarterly observations for over 1, 500 variables. In those cases where the departure from gold happened on clearly defined dates, it seems clear that inflationary expectations rose in the wake of departure. IV, diff-in-diff, and synthetic matching techniques suggest that the relationship is causal.
27586.zh_abstract: 各国是如何从大萧条中复苏的？在本文中，我们探讨了这样一个论点：脱离金本位制通过提振通胀预期和降低实际利率来帮助复苏。我们针对27个国家的样本进行了研究，使用了现代即时预测方法以及一个新的数据集，该数据集包含超过1500个变量的23万多个月度及季度观测值。在那些脱离金本位制发生在明确界定日期的案例中，通胀预期似乎在脱离后明显上升。工具变量法、双重差分法和合成匹配法表明这种关系是因果性的。

27585.title: Why Do Borrowers Default on Mortgages?
27585.zh_title: 借款人为何拖欠抵押贷款？
27585.abstract: There are three prevailing theories of mortgage default: strategic default (driven by negative equity), cash-flow default (driven by negative life events), and double-trigger default (where both negative triggers are necessary). It has been difficult to test between these theories in part because negative life events are measured with error. We address this measurement error using a comparison group of borrowers with no strategic default motive. Our central finding is that only 6 percent of underwater defaults are caused exclusively by negative equity, an order of magnitude lower than previously thought. We then analyze the remaining defaults. We find that 70 percent are driven solely by negative life events (i.e., cash-flow defaults), while 24 percent are driven by the interaction between negative life events and negative equity (i.e., double-trigger defaults). Together, the results provide a full decomposition of the three theories underlying borrower default and suggest that negative life events play a central role.
27585.zh_abstract: 关于抵押贷款违约，存在三种主流理论：策略性违约（由负资产驱动）、现金流违约（由负面生活事件驱动）以及双重触发违约（两种负面触发因素均不可或缺）。检验这些理论一直很困难，部分原因在于负面生活事件的衡量存在误差。我们通过使用一组没有策略性违约动机的借款人作为对照组来解决这一测量误差问题。我们的核心发现是，仅有6%的负资产违约完全由负资产引起，这比之前认为的低了一个数量级。然后我们分析了剩余的违约。我们发现，70%的违约完全由负面生活事件驱动（即现金流违约），而24%的违约由负面生活事件与负资产的交互作用驱动（即双重触发违约）。综合来看，这些结果对借款人违约背后的三种理论进行了完整分解，并表明负面生活事件起着核心作用。

27584.title: How Do Prescription Drug Monitoring Programs Reduce Opioid Prescribing? The Role of Hassle Costs versus Information
27584.zh_title: 处方药监测计划如何减少阿片类药物处方？麻烦成本与信息的作用
27584.authors: Abby E. Alpert, Sarah E. Dykstra, Mireille Jacobson
27584.abstract: Past work demonstrates that mandated prescription drug monitoring programs (PDMPs) decrease opioid prescribing, but provides limited evidence on mechanisms. We analyze Kentucky’s landmark PDMP mandate to disentangle the role of information versus hassle costs. PDMP mandates are meant to affect prescribing through information provision but may also unintentionally affect prescribing through the hassle cost of required record checks. On net, we find that although information clearly affected prescribing, hassle costs explain the majority of the decline in prescribing from this program. Hassle costs, however, did not deter physicians from prescribing opioids to the patients who would benefit the most
27584.zh_abstract: 以往研究表明，强制性的处方药监测计划（PDMPs）减少了阿片类药物的处方，但关于其作用机制的证据有限。我们分析了肯塔基州具有里程碑意义的PDMP强制令，以厘清信息与麻烦成本各自的作用。PDMP强制令旨在通过信息提供影响处方行为，但也可能因要求进行记录核查的麻烦成本而无意中影响处方。总体而言，我们发现尽管信息确实影响了处方行为，但麻烦成本解释了该计划导致处方量下降的大部分原因。然而，麻烦成本并未阻止医生向最可能受益的患者开具阿片类药物。

27583.title: Social Protection amidst Social Upheaval: Examining the Impact of a Multi-Faceted Program for Ultra-Poor Households in Yemen
27583.zh_title: 社会动荡中的社会保护：审视也门极端贫困家庭多层面计划的影响
27583.authors: Lasse Brune, Dean Karlan, Sikandra Kurdi, Christopher R. Udry
27583.abstract: Social protection programs are needed more than ever during periods of social upheaval, but are also likely to be even harder to implement successfully. Furthermore, social upheaval makes measuring the impact of such policies all the more difficult. We study the impact of a multi-faceted social protection program, often referred to as a “graduation” model program, in Yemen during a period of civil unrest. We are unable to measure outcomes for four years, thus much remains unknown about what transpired in the intermediary time. After four years we find positive impacts on savings behavior and asset accumulation, albeit substantially less than the amount the household originally received.
27583.zh_abstract: 在社会动荡时期，社会保护计划比以往任何时候都更需要，但也可能更难成功实施。此外，社会动荡使得衡量此类政策的影响更加困难。我们研究了也门在内乱期间实施的一项多层面社会保护计划（通常称为“毕业”模式计划）的影响。我们无法在四年内衡量结果，因此中间时期发生了什么仍有许多未知。四年后，我们发现对储蓄行为和资产积累产生了积极影响，尽管这些影响远低于家庭最初收到的金额。

27582.title: Using Tax Data to Better Capture Top Incomes in Official UK Income Inequality Statistics
27582.zh_title: 利用税收数据更好地捕捉英国官方收入不平等统计中的顶层收入
27582.authors: Dominic Webber, Richard P. Tonkin, Martin Shine
27582.abstract: It is widely recognised that household surveys do not fully capture the incomes of the very richest individuals and households, particularly those among the so-called “top 1%”, for reasons including non-response and under-reporting. As a consequence, estimates based on survey data alone typically understate true levels of inequality.
27582.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认识到，家庭调查未能完全捕捉最富裕个人和家庭的收入，尤其是那些所谓的“前1%”人群，原因包括无回应和低报。因此，仅基于调查数据的估计通常会低估真实的收入不平等水平。

27581.title: Age Discrimination across the Business Cycle
27581.zh_title: 经济周期中的年龄歧视
27581.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Matthew M. Knepper
27581.abstract: We test whether age discrimination rises during recessions using two complementary analyses. Confidential EEOC microdata reveal that age-related firing and hiring charges rise by 3.3% and 1.6%, respectively, for each percentage point increase in a state-industry’s monthly unemployment. Though the opportunity cost of filing falls, the fraction of meritorious claims increases—a sufficient condition for rising discrimination under plausible assumptions. Second, we repurpose data from hiring correspondence studies conducted across different cities and time periods during the recovery from the Great Recession. Each percentage point increase in local unemployment reduces the callback rate for older versus younger women by 15%.
27581.zh_abstract: 我们通过两项互补分析来检验经济衰退期间年龄歧视是否加剧。保密的EEOC微观数据显示，州-行业月度失业率每上升一个百分点，与年龄相关的解雇和招聘指控分别增加3.3%和1.6%。尽管提出指控的机会成本下降，但有理有据的索赔比例上升——在合理假设下，这是歧视加剧的充分条件。其次，我们重新利用了经济大衰退复苏期间在不同城市和时间段进行的招聘对应研究数据。当地失业率每上升一个百分点，年长女性相对于年轻女性的回电率下降15%。

27580.title: Heterogeneous Paths of Industrialization
27580.abstract: Industrialization experiences differ substantially across countries. We use a benchmark model of structural change to shed light on the sources of this heterogeneity and, in particular, the phenomenon of premature deindustrialization. Our analysis leads to three key findings. First, benchmark models of structural change robustly generate hump-shaped patterns for the evolution of the industrial sector. Second, heterogeneous patterns of catch-up in sectoral productivities across countries can generate variation in industrialization experiences similar to those found in the data, including premature deindustrialization. Third, differences in the rate of agricultural productivity growth across economies can account for the majority of the variation in peak industrial employment shares.
27580.zh_abstract: 各国的工业化经历存在显著差异。我们使用一个结构变迁的基准模型来阐明这种异质性的来源，特别是过早去工业化现象。我们的分析得出三个关键发现。首先，结构变迁的基准模型稳健地产生了工业部门演变的驼峰形模式。其次，各国部门生产率追赶模式的异质性可以产生与数据中相似的工业化经历差异，包括过早去工业化。第三，各经济体农业生产率增长率的差异可以解释工业就业峰值份额变化的大部分原因。

27579.title: Investing in Ex Ante Regulation: Evidence from Pharmaceutical Patent Examination
27579.zh_title: 投资于事前监管：来自药品专利审查的证据
27579.authors: Michael D. Frakes, Melissa F. Wasserman
27579.abstract: We explore how the Patent Office may improve the quality of issued patents on “secondary” drug features by giving examiners more time to review drug-patent applications. Our findings suggest that current time allocations are causing examiners to issue low quality secondary patents on the margin. To assess the merits of expanding ex ante scrutiny of drug-patent applications at the agency, we set forth estimates of the various gains and losses associated with giving examiners more time, including reduced downstream litigation costs and added personnel expenses, along with both the static gains and dynamic innovation losses associated with earlier generic entry.
27579.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了专利局如何通过给予审查员更多时间审查药品专利申请书，来提高针对药物“次要”特征所颁发专利的质量。我们的研究结果表明，当前的时间分配正导致审查员在边际上颁发低质量的次要专利。为了评估在机构层面扩大对药品专利申请进行事前审查的利弊，我们估算了给予审查员更多时间所带来的各种收益和损失，包括减少下游诉讼成本和增加人员开支，以及与更早的仿制药进入相关的静态收益和动态创新损失。

27578.title: Mortality Effects and Choice Across Private Health Insurance Plans
27578.zh_title: 私人健康保险计划中的死亡率效应与选择
27578.authors: Jason Abaluck, Mauricio M. Caceres Bravo, Peter Hull, Amanda Starc
27578.abstract: Competition in health insurance markets may fail to improve health outcomes if consumers are not willing to pay for high quality plans. We document large differences in the mortality rates of Medicare Advantage (MA) plans within local markets. We then show that when high (low) mortality plans exit these markets, enrollees tend to switch to more typical plans and subsequently experience lower (higher) mortality. We develop a framework that uses this variation to estimate the relationship between observed mortality rates and causal mortality effects; we find a tight link. We then extend the framework to study other predictors of mortality effects and estimate consumer willingness to pay. Higher spending plans tend to reduce enrollee mortality, but existing quality ratings are uncorrelated with plan mortality effects. Consumers place little weight on mortality effects when choosing plans. Moving beneficiaries out of the bottom 5% of plans could save tens of thousands of elderly lives each year.
27578.zh_abstract: 如果消费者不愿意为高质量计划付费，健康保险市场的竞争可能无法改善健康结果。我们记录了当地市场中Medicare Advantage（MA）计划之间死亡率的巨大差异。然后我们表明，当高（低）死亡率计划退出这些市场时，参保者倾向于转向更典型的计划，随后经历更低（更高）的死亡率。我们开发了一个框架，利用这种变化来估计观察到的死亡率与因果死亡率效应之间的关系；我们发现两者之间存在紧密联系。然后我们扩展该框架以研究死亡率效应的其他预测因素，并估计消费者的支付意愿。支出较高的计划倾向于降低参保者死亡率，但现有的质量评级与计划的死亡率效应不相关。消费者在选择计划时很少考虑死亡率效应。将受益人从最差的5%计划中转移出来，每年可以挽救数万名老年人的生命。
27578.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C26, I11, J14

27577.title: Conflicting Interests and the Effect of Fiduciary Duty — Evidence from Variable Annuities
27577.zh_title: 利益冲突与受托责任的影响——来自可变年金的证据
27577.authors: Mark L. Egan, Shan Ge, Johnny Tang
27577.abstract: We examine the drivers of variable annuity sales and the impact of a proposed regulatory change. Variable annuities are popular retirement products with over $\$2$ trillion in assets in the United States. Insurers typically pay brokers a commission for selling variable annuities that ranges from 0% to over 10% of investors’ premium payments. Brokers earn higher commissions for selling inferior annuities, in terms of higher expenses and more ex-post complaints. Our results indicate that variable annuity sales are roughly four times as sensitive to brokers’ financial interests as to investors’. To help limit conflicts of interest, the Department of Labor proposed a rule in 2016 that would hold brokers to a fiduciary standard when dealing with retirement accounts. We find that after the proposed fiduciary rule, sales of high-expense variable annuities fell by 52% as sales became more sensitive to expenses and insurers increased the relative availability of low-expense products. Based on our structural model estimates, investor welfare improved as a result of the fiduciary rule under conservative assumptions.
27577.zh_abstract: 我们研究了可变年金销售的驱动因素以及一项拟议监管变化的影响。可变年金是受欢迎的退休产品，在美国拥有超过2万亿美元的资产。保险公司通常向销售可变年金的经纪人支付佣金，佣金范围从投资者保费的0%到超过10%不等。经纪人通过销售劣质年金（表现为更高的费用和更多的事后投诉）赚取更高的佣金。我们的结果表明，可变年金销售对经纪人财务利益的敏感度大约是对投资者财务利益敏感度的四倍。为帮助限制利益冲突，劳工部在2016年提出了一项规则，要求经纪人在处理退休账户时遵守受托标准。我们发现，在拟议的受托规则之后，高费用可变年金的销售额下降了52%，因为销售对费用变得更加敏感，并且保险公司增加了低费用产品的相对供应量。基于我们的结构模型估计，在保守假设下，受托规则改善了投资者福利。

27575.title: How Much to Save? Decision Costs and Retirement Plan Participation
27575.zh_title: 储蓄多少？决策成本与退休计划参与
27575.authors: Jacob Goldin, Tatiana Homonoff, Richard W. Patterson, William L. Skimmyhorn
27575.abstract: Deciding how much to save for retirement can be complicated. Drawing on a field experiment conducted with the Department of Defense, we study whether such complexity depresses participation in an employer-sponsored retirement saving plan. We find that simplifying one dimension of the enrollment decision, by highlighting a potential rate at which non-participants might contribute, increases participation in the plan. Similar communications that did not include a highlighted rate yield smaller effects. The results highlight how reducing complexity on the intensive margin of a decision (how much to contribute) can affect extensive margin behavior (whether to contribute at all) in a setting of policy interest.
27575.zh_abstract: 决定为退休储蓄多少可能很复杂。我们利用与国防部合作开展的一项实地实验，研究这种复杂性是否会抑制员工参与雇主赞助的退休储蓄计划。我们发现，通过突出显示非参与者可能缴纳的潜在费率来简化注册决策的一个维度，可以提高计划的参与率。未包含突出显示费率的类似沟通产生的效果较小。这些结果凸显了在政策关注的背景下，减少决策集约边际（缴纳多少）上的复杂性如何能够影响广延边际行为（是否缴纳）。

27574.title: Do Unemployment Insurance Benefits Improve Match and Employer Quality? Evidence from Recent U.S. Recessions
27574.zh_title: 失业保险金能否提高匹配质量和雇主质量？来自近期美国经济衰退的证据
27574.authors: Ammar Farooq, Adriana D. Kugler, Umberto Muratori
27574.abstract: Unemployment Insurance (UI) benefits have a moral hazard effect and a liquidity effect, with both generating increases in unemployment spells but the latter increasing wages due to the ability to find better matches or better jobs. Previous papers, however, find mixed evidence on the impact of UI on wages. In this paper, we re-examine the effect of UI on wages in the U.S. and present novel evidence using LEHD data to examine the channels through which UI increases earnings, including: (1) the quality of the match, (2) positive sorting of employers and employees, and (3) the quality of the employer. We find that the increased UI generosity in the U.S. increased wages by both increasing the quality of the match as well as the quality of the job obtained after the unemployment spell, though there is less evidence of improved sorting. Consistent with improvements in match and employer quality, we also find that the likelihood of remaining on the job increases with UI generosity. Consistent with a liquidity effect on search, we also find that the effects on the quality of the match are larger for those who are more likely to be liquidity constrained, including women, minorities, and the less-educated.
27574.zh_abstract: 失业保险金具有道德风险效应和流动性效应，两者都会导致失业期延长，但后者由于能够找到更好的匹配或更好的工作而提高工资。然而，以往的论文关于失业保险金对工资影响的证据不一。在本文中，我们重新审视了失业保险金对美国工资的影响，并利用LEHD数据提供了新的证据，以考察失业保险金提高收入的渠道，包括：(1) 匹配质量，(2) 雇主与员工的正向分类，以及(3) 雇主质量。我们发现，美国失业保险金慷慨度的提高通过提高匹配质量以及失业期后获得的工作质量来提高工资，尽管改善分类的证据较少。与匹配质量和雇主质量的改善一致，我们还发现，随着失业保险金慷慨度的提高，留在工作岗位上的可能性也会增加。与流动性对搜索的影响一致，我们还发现，对于那些更可能面临流动性约束的人群，包括女性、少数族裔和受教育程度较低者，对匹配质量的影响更大。
27574.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C55, E24, H23, J21, J31, J64, J65

27573.title: Out of Sight No More? The Effect of Fee Disclosures on 401(k) Investment Allocations
27573.zh_title: 不再被忽视？费用披露对401(k)投资配置的影响
27573.authors: Mathias Kronlund, Veronika K. Pool, Clemens Sialm, Irina Stefanescu
27573.abstract: We examine the effects of a 2012 regulatory reform that mandated fee and performance disclosures for the investment options in 401(k) plans. We show that participants became significantly more attentive to expense ratios and short-term performance after the reform. The disclosure effects are stronger among plans with large average contributions per participant and weaker for plans with many investment options. Additionally, these results are not driven by secular changes in investor behavior or sponsor-initiated changes to the investment menus. Our findings suggest that providing salient fee and performance information can mitigate participants' inertia in retirement plans.
27573.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2012年一项监管改革的影响，该改革强制要求披露401(k)计划中投资选项的费用和业绩。我们显示，改革后，参与者对费用比率和短期业绩的关注度显著提高。披露效应在每位参与者平均缴款额较大的计划中更强，而在投资选项较多的计划中较弱。此外，这些结果并非由投资者行为的长期变化或发起人主导的投资菜单变化所驱动。我们的发现表明，提供显著的费用和业绩信息可以减轻参与者在退休计划中的惰性。
27573.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, LE, PE；JEL：G11, G18, G23, G28, G41, G51, H31, H55

27572.title: Experienced Segregation
27572.authors: Susan Athey, Billy A. Ferguson, Matthew Gentzkow, Tobias Schmidt
27572.abstract: We estimate a measure of segregation, experienced isolation, that captures individuals’ exposure to diverse others in the places they visit over the course of their days. Using Global Positioning System (GPS) data collected from smartphones, we measure experienced isolation by race. We find that the isolation individuals experience is substantially lower than standard residential isolation measures would suggest, but that experienced and residential isolation are highly correlated across cities. Experienced isolation is lower relative to residential isolation in denser, wealthier, more educated cities with high levels of public transit use, and is also negatively correlated with income mobility.
27572.zh_abstract: 我们估算了一个隔离指标——经历中的孤立，该指标捕捉了个体在一天中访问的地点接触不同人群的程度。利用从智能手机收集的全球定位系统数据，我们按种族测量了经历中的孤立。我们发现，个体经历中的孤立程度远低于标准居住隔离指标所显示的水平，但经历中的孤立与居住隔离在城市间高度相关。在人口密度更高、更富裕、受教育程度更高、公共交通使用率高的城市，经历中的孤立相对于居住隔离更低，并且与收入流动性呈负相关。

27599.title: Valuing the Global Mortality Consequences of Climate Change Accounting for Adaptation Costs and Benefits
27599.zh_title: 考虑适应成本与收益的气候变化全球死亡率后果评估
27599.authors: Tamma A. Carleton, Amir Jina, Michael T. Delgado, Michael Greenstone, Trevor Houser, Solomon M. Hsiang, Andrew Hultgren, Robert E. Kopp, Kelly E. McCusker, Ishan B. Nath, James Rising, Ashwin Rode, Hee Kwon Seo, Arvid Viaene, Jiacan Yuan, Alice Tianbo Zhang
27599.abstract: Using 40 countries’ subnational data, we estimate age-specific mortality-temperature relationships and extrapolate them to countries without data today and into a future with climate change. We uncover a U-shaped relationship where extreme cold and hot temperatures increase mortality rates, especially for the elderly. Critically, this relationship is flattened by both higher incomes and adaptation to local climate. Using a revealed preference approach to recover unobserved adaptation costs, we estimate that the mean global increase in mortality risk due to climate change, accounting for adaptation benefits and costs, is valued at roughly 3.2% of global GDP in 2100 under a high emissions scenario. Notably, today’s cold locations are projected to benefit, while today’s poor and hot locations have large projected damages. Finally, our central estimates indicate that the release of an additional ton of CO2 today will cause mortality-related damages of $\$36.6$ under a high emissions scenario, with an interquartile range accounting for both econometric and climate uncertainty of [-$\$7.8$, $\$73.0$]. These empirically grounded estimates exceed the previous literature’s estimates by an order of magnitude.
27599.zh_abstract: 利用40个国家的次国家级数据，我们估计了特定年龄的死亡率-温度关系，并将其外推至当前无数据的国家以及未来气候变化情景。我们发现了一种U型关系，即极端寒冷和炎热温度会增加死亡率，尤其是对老年人而言。关键的是，这种关系因更高的收入和适应当地气候而变得平缓。通过使用显示性偏好方法恢复未观测到的适应成本，我们估计，在高排放情景下，到2100年，考虑适应收益和成本后，气候变化导致的全球平均死亡率风险增加价值约为全球GDP的3.2%。值得注意的是，当前寒冷地区预计将受益，而当前贫困和炎热地区则面临巨大的预计损失。最后，我们的中心估计表明，在高排放情景下，今天每多释放一吨二氧化碳将导致与死亡率相关的损失36.6美元，其四分位距（涵盖计量经济学和气候不确定性）为[-7.8美元, 73.0美元]。这些基于实证的估计值比以往文献的估计值高出一个数量级。

27576.title: The Aggregate Effects of Fiscal Stimulus: Evidence from the COVID-19 Unemployment Supplement
27576.zh_title: 财政刺激的总体效应：来自新冠疫情失业补助的证据
27576.authors: Miguel Garza Casado, Britta Glennon, Julia Lane, David McQuown, Daniel Rich, Bruce A. Weinberg
27576.abstract: The current economic crisis has highlighted the need for data that are both timely and local so that the effects of fiscal policy options on local economies can be evaluated more immediately. This paper highlights the potential value of using two new sources of near real-time data to inform decisions about the appropriate stimulus approach to implement. The first data source is administrative records that provide universal, weekly, information on unemployment claimants. The second data source is transaction level data on economic activity that are available on a daily basis. We make use of discrete changes in stimulus payments to construct a framework for evaluating real-time effects of fiscal policy on local economic activity. In particular, we leverage cross-county and over-time variation in the relative size of the Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation (FPUC) COVID-19 supplement to Unemployment Insurance – from $\$0$ to $\$600$ to $\$300$ between March and September 2020 - to estimate the local economic impact of unemployment, earnings replacement, and the interaction between the two. We find that higher earnings replacement rates lead to significantly more consumer spending, even with increases in the unemployment claimant rate, which is consistent with the goal of the fiscal stimulus.
27576.zh_abstract: 当前的经济危机凸显了对既及时又本地化的数据的需求，以便能够更即时地评估财政政策选项对地方经济的影响。本文强调了利用两种新的近实时数据源来为实施适当刺激方法的决策提供信息的潜在价值。第一个数据源是提供每周、普遍性的失业索赔人信息的行政记录。第二个数据源是按日可获取的经济活动交易层面数据。我们利用刺激支付的离散变化构建了一个评估财政政策对地方经济活动实时影响的框架。具体而言，我们利用2020年3月至9月间联邦大流行失业补偿（FPUC）新冠疫情失业保险补助的相对规模——从0美元到600美元再到300美元——在县际和时间上的变化，来估算失业、收入替代以及两者交互作用对地方经济的影响。我们发现，即使失业索赔率上升，更高的收入替代率也会显著增加消费者支出，这与财政刺激的目标一致。
27576.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E21, E62, H3, J65

27598.title: Patent Quality: Towards a Systematic Framework for Analysis and Measurement
27598.zh_title: 专利质量：迈向系统化分析与测量框架
27598.authors: Kyle W. Higham, Gaétan de Rassenfosse, Adam B. Jaffe
27598.abstract: The 'quality' of novel technological innovations is extremely variable, and the ability to measure innovation quality is essential to sensible, evidence-based policy. Patents, an often vital precursor to a commercialised innovation, share this heterogeneous quality distribution. A pertinent question then arises: How should we define and measure patent quality? Accepting that different stakeholders have different views of this concept, we take a multi-dimensional view of patent quality in this work. We first test the consistency of popular post-grant outcomes that are often used as patent quality measures. Finding these measures to be generally inconsistent, we then use a raft of patent indicators that are defined at the time of grant to dissect the characteristics associated with different post-grant outcomes. We find broad disagreement in the relative importance of individual characteristics between outcomes and, further, significant variation of the same across technologies within outcomes. We conclude that measurement of patent quality is highly sensitive to both stakeholder viewpoint and technology type. Our findings bear implications for scholarly research using patent data as well as for policy discussions about patent quality.
27598.zh_abstract: 新型技术创新的“质量”具有极大的变异性，而衡量创新质量的能力对于制定明智的循证政策至关重要。专利作为商业化创新的关键前提，同样呈现出这种异质性的质量分布。由此产生一个关键问题：我们应如何定义和衡量专利质量？考虑到不同利益相关者对这一概念持有不同观点，本研究从多维视角审视专利质量。我们首先检验了常被用作专利质量衡量指标的授权后结果的内部一致性。发现这些指标普遍不一致后，我们利用一系列在专利授权时定义的指标，剖析了与不同授权后结果相关的特征。我们发现，不同结果之间各特征相对重要性存在广泛分歧，且在同一结果内部，不同技术领域间也存在显著差异。我们得出结论：专利质量的衡量对利益相关者视角和技术类型高度敏感。我们的发现对使用专利数据的学术研究以及关于专利质量的政策讨论均具有启示意义。
